revision.text:
'''「稲荷」の付く日本列島の古墳一覧'''（いなりのつくにほんれっとうのこふんいちらん）とする本項では、名称に「稲荷」（いなり/とうか）が付く[[日本列島]]の[[古墳時代]]の[[古墳]]および[[古墳群]]について一覧化する。 ==概要== [[日本列島]]には「稲荷塚」や「稲荷山」を冠する古墳が数多く存在し、これ以外にも「稲荷森」や「稲荷前」・「稲荷台」など「稲荷」以下が異なる様々な[[バリエーション]]が存在する。
==稲荷山古墳== {{main|稲荷山古墳}} * [[白石稲荷山古墳]] - [[群馬県]][[藤岡市]]。[[白石古墳群]]の1基。 * [[稲荷山古墳 (太田市)]] - 群馬県[[太田市]]。 * 上小塙稲荷山古墳- 群馬県[[高崎市]]。 * [[風返稲荷山古墳]] - [[茨城県]][[かすみがうら市]]。 * [[稲荷山古墳 (行田市)]] -[[埼玉県]][[行田市]]。[[埼玉古墳群]]の1基。 **[[稲荷山古墳出土鉄剣]] * [[稲荷山古墳 (富津市)]] - [[千葉県]][[富津市]]。[[内裏塚古墳群]]の1基。 * 稲荷山古墳 (牧之原市) - [[静岡県]][[牧之原市]]。 *[[御厨古墳群|稲荷山古墳]]-静岡県[[磐田市]]。[[御厨古墳群]]の1基。 * [[三ツ井稲荷山古墳]] - [[愛知県]][[一宮市]]。 * [[鴨稲荷山古墳]] - [[滋賀県]][[高島市]]。 * [[稲荷山古墳 (丹波篠山市)]] -[[兵庫県]][[丹波篠山市]]。
==稲荷塚古墳== *[[稲荷塚古墳群]]-[[埼玉県]][[比企郡]][[川島町]] *[[稲荷塚古墳 (嵐山町)]]-[[埼玉県]][[比企郡]][[嵐山町]] *[[樋遣川古墳群|稲荷塚古墳 (加須市)]]-埼玉県[[加須市]]。[[樋遣川古墳群]]の1基。 *[[稲荷台古墳群]]-[[千葉県]][[市原市]] **[[稲荷台1号墳]] *[[稲荷塚古墳|稲荷塚古墳 (多摩市)]]-[[東京都]][[多摩市]] *[[稲荷塚古墳 (甲府市)]]-[[山梨県]][[甲府市]] *[[古市古墳群|稲荷塚古墳 (羽曳野市)]]-[[大阪府]][[藤井寺市]]。[[古市古墳群]]の1基。
==その他== *[[稲荷森古墳]]-[[山形県]][[南陽市]] *[[稲荷古墳群]]-[[栃木県]][[宇都宮市]] *[[寅稲荷古墳]]-[[埼玉県]][[深谷市]]。[[四十塚古墳群]]の1基。 *[[大稲荷古墳群]]（おおとうかこふんぐん）-埼玉県[[行田市]] *[[三変稲荷神社古墳]]-[[埼玉県]][[川越市]]。[[仙波古墳群]]の1基。 *[[鶴ヶ丘稲荷神社古墳]]-埼玉県[[鶴ヶ島市]] *[[稲荷山公園古墳群]]-埼玉県[[狭山市]] *[[祇園・長須賀古墳群|稲荷森古墳 (木更津市)]]-[[千葉県]][[木更津市]]。[[祇園・長須賀古墳群]]の1基。 *[[稲荷前古墳群]]-[[神奈川県]][[横浜市]] *[[元稲荷古墳]]-[[京都府]][[向日市]]。向日丘陵古墳群の1基。
==関連項目== *[[日本の古墳一覧]]
{{考古学}} {{DEFAULTSORT:いなりのつくにほんれつとうのこふんいちらん}} [[Category:日本の古墳]]

'''「稲荷」の付く日本列島の古墳一覧'''（いなりのつくにほんれっとうのこふんいちらん）とする本項では、名称に「稲荷」（いなり/とうか）が付く[[日本列島]]の[[古墳時代]]の[[古墳]]および[[古墳群]]について一覧化する。 ==概要== [[日本列島]]には「稲荷塚」や「稲荷山」を冠する古墳が数多く存在し、これ以外にも「稲荷森」や「稲荷前」・「稲荷台」など「稲荷」以下が異なる様々な[[バリエーション]]が存在する。
==稲荷山古墳== {{main|稲荷山古墳}} * [[白石稲荷山古墳]] - [[群馬県]][[藤岡市]]。[[白石古墳群]]の1基。 * [[稲荷山古墳 (太田市)]] - 群馬県[[太田市]]。 * 上小塙稲荷山古墳- 群馬県[[高崎市]]。 * [[風返稲荷山古墳]] - [[茨城県]][[かすみがうら市]]。 * [[稲荷山古墳 (行田市)]] -[[埼玉県]][[行田市]]。[[埼玉古墳群]]の1基。 **[[稲荷山古墳出土鉄剣]] * [[稲荷山古墳 (富津市)]] - [[千葉県]][[富津市]]。[[内裏塚古墳群]]の1基。 * 稲荷山古墳 (牧之原市) - [[静岡県]][[牧之原市]]。 *[[御厨古墳群|稲荷山古墳]]-静岡県[[磐田市]]。[[御厨古墳群]]の1基。 * [[三ツ井稲荷山古墳]] - [[愛知県]][[一宮市]]。 * [[鴨稲荷山古墳]] - [[滋賀県]][[高島市]]。 * [[稲荷山古墳 (丹波篠山市)]] -[[兵庫県]][[丹波篠山市]]。
==稲荷塚古墳== *[[稲荷塚古墳群]]-[[埼玉県]][[比企郡]][[川島町]] *[[稲荷塚古墳 (嵐山町)]]-[[埼玉県]][[比企郡]][[嵐山町]] *[[樋遣川古墳群|稲荷塚古墳 (加須市)]]-埼玉県[[加須市]]。[[樋遣川古墳群]]の1基。 *[[稲荷塚古墳|稲荷塚古墳 (多摩市)]]-[[東京都]][[多摩市]] *[[稲荷塚古墳 (甲府市)]]-[[山梨県]][[甲府市]] *[[古市古墳群|稲荷塚古墳 (羽曳野市)]]-[[大阪府]][[藤井寺市]]。[[古市古墳群]]の1基。
==その他== *[[稲荷森古墳]]-[[山形県]][[南陽市]] *[[稲荷古墳群]]-[[栃木県]][[宇都宮市]] *[[寅稲荷古墳]]-[[埼玉県]][[深谷市]]。[[四十塚古墳群]]の1基。 *[[大稲荷古墳群]]（おおとうかこふんぐん）-埼玉県[[行田市]] *[[三変稲荷神社古墳]]-[[埼玉県]][[川越市]]。[[仙波古墳群]]の1基。 *[[鶴ヶ丘稲荷神社古墳]]-埼玉県[[鶴ヶ島市]] *[[稲荷山公園古墳群]]-埼玉県[[狭山市]] *[[稲荷台古墳群]]-[[千葉県]][[市原市]] **[[稲荷台1号墳]] *[[祇園・長須賀古墳群|稲荷森古墳 (木更津市)]]-[[千葉県]][[木更津市]]。[[祇園・長須賀古墳群]]の1基。 *[[稲荷前古墳群]]-[[神奈川県]][[横浜市]] *[[元稲荷古墳]]-[[京都府]][[向日市]]。向日丘陵古墳群の1基。 *[[井ノ内稲荷塚古墳]][[京都府]][[長岡京市]] ==関連項目== *[[日本の古墳一覧]]
{{考古学}} {{DEFAULTSORT:いなりのつくにほんれつとうのこふんいちらん}} [[Category:日本の古墳]]

'''「稲荷」の付く日本列島の古墳一覧'''（いなりのつくにほんれっとうのこふんいちらん）とする本項では、名称に「稲荷」（いなり/とうか）が付く[[日本列島]]の[[古墳時代]]の[[古墳]]および[[古墳群]]について一覧化する。 ==概要== [[日本列島]]には「稲荷塚」や「稲荷山」を冠する古墳が数多く存在し、これ以外にも「稲荷森」や「稲荷前」・「稲荷台」など「稲荷」以下が異なる様々な[[バリエーション]]が存在する。
==稲荷山古墳== {{main|稲荷山古墳}} * [[白石稲荷山古墳]] - [[群馬県]][[藤岡市]]。[[白石古墳群]]の1基。 * [[稲荷山古墳 (太田市)]] - 群馬県[[太田市]]。 * 上小塙稲荷山古墳- 群馬県[[高崎市]]。 * [[風返稲荷山古墳]] - [[茨城県]][[かすみがうら市]]。 * [[稲荷山古墳 (行田市)]] -[[埼玉県]][[行田市]]。[[埼玉古墳群]]の1基。 **[[稲荷山古墳出土鉄剣]] * [[稲荷山古墳 (富津市)]] - [[千葉県]][[富津市]]。[[内裏塚古墳群]]の1基。 * 稲荷山古墳 (牧之原市) - [[静岡県]][[牧之原市]]。 *[[御厨古墳群|稲荷山古墳]]-静岡県[[磐田市]]。[[御厨古墳群]]の1基。 * [[三ツ井稲荷山古墳]] - [[愛知県]][[一宮市]]。 * [[鴨稲荷山古墳]] - [[滋賀県]][[高島市]]。 * [[稲荷山古墳 (丹波篠山市)]] -[[兵庫県]][[丹波篠山市]]。
==稲荷塚古墳== *[[稲荷塚古墳群]]-[[埼玉県]][[比企郡]][[川島町]] *[[稲荷塚古墳 (嵐山町)]]-[[埼玉県]][[比企郡]][[嵐山町]] *[[樋遣川古墳群|稲荷塚古墳 (加須市)]]-埼玉県[[加須市]]。[[樋遣川古墳群]]の1基。 *[[稲荷塚古墳|稲荷塚古墳 (多摩市)]]-[[東京都]][[多摩市]] *[[稲荷塚古墳 (甲府市)]]-[[山梨県]][[甲府市]] *[[古市古墳群|稲荷塚古墳 (羽曳野市)]]-[[大阪府]][[藤井寺市]]。[[古市古墳群]]の1基。 *[[井ノ内稲荷塚古墳]]-[[京都府]][[長岡京市]]
==その他== *[[稲荷森古墳]]-[[山形県]][[南陽市]] *[[稲荷古墳群]]-[[栃木県]][[宇都宮市]] *[[寅稲荷古墳]]-[[埼玉県]][[深谷市]]。[[四十塚古墳群]]の1基。 *[[大稲荷古墳群]]（おおとうかこふんぐん）-埼玉県[[行田市]] *[[三変稲荷神社古墳]]-[[埼玉県]][[川越市]]。[[仙波古墳群]]の1基。 *[[鶴ヶ丘稲荷神社古墳]]-埼玉県[[鶴ヶ島市]] *[[稲荷山公園古墳群]]-埼玉県[[狭山市]] *[[稲荷台古墳群]]-[[千葉県]][[市原市]] **[[稲荷台1号墳]] *[[祇園・長須賀古墳群|稲荷森古墳 (木更津市)]]-[[千葉県]][[木更津市]]。[[祇園・長須賀古墳群]]の1基。 *[[稲荷前古墳群]]-[[神奈川県]][[横浜市]] *[[元稲荷古墳]]-[[京都府]][[向日市]]。向日丘陵古墳群の1基。

{{考古学}} {{DEFAULTSORT:いなりのつくにほんれつとうのこふんいちらん}} [[Category:日本の古墳]]

'''「稲荷」の付く日本列島の古墳一覧'''（いなりのつくにほんれっとうのこふんいちらん）とする本項では、名称に「稲荷」（いなり/とうか）が付く[[日本列島]]の[[古墳時代]]の[[古墳]]および[[古墳群]]について一覧化する。
==概要== [[日本列島]]には「稲荷塚」や「稲荷山」を冠する古墳が数多く存在し、これ以外にも「稲荷森」や「稲荷前」・「稲荷台」など「稲荷」以下が異なる様々な[[バリエーション]]が存在する。
==稲荷山古墳== {{main|稲荷山古墳}} * [[白石稲荷山古墳]] - [[群馬県]][[藤岡市]]。[[白石古墳群]]の1基。 * [[稲荷山古墳 (太田市)]] - 群馬県[[太田市]]。 * 上小塙稲荷山古墳 - 群馬県[[高崎市]]。 * [[風返稲荷山古墳]] - [[茨城県]][[かすみがうら市]]。 * [[稲荷山古墳 (行田市)]] -[[埼玉県]][[行田市]]。[[埼玉古墳群]]の1基。 **[[稲荷山古墳出土鉄剣]] * [[稲荷山古墳 (富津市)]] - [[千葉県]][[富津市]]。[[内裏塚古墳群]]の1基。 * 稲荷山古墳 (牧之原市) - [[静岡県]][[牧之原市]]。 *[[御厨古墳群|稲荷山古墳]] - 静岡県[[磐田市]]。[[御厨古墳群]]の1基。 * [[三ツ井稲荷山古墳]] - [[愛知県]][[一宮市]]。 * [[鴨稲荷山古墳]] - [[滋賀県]][[高島市]]。 * [[稲荷山古墳 (丹波篠山市)]] - [[兵庫県]][[丹波篠山市]]。
==稲荷塚古墳== *[[稲荷塚古墳群]] - [[埼玉県]][[比企郡]][[川島町]] *[[稲荷塚古墳 (嵐山町)]] - [[埼玉県]][[比企郡]][[嵐山町]] *[[樋遣川古墳群|稲荷塚古墳 (加須市)]] - 埼玉県[[加須市]]。[[樋遣川古墳群]]の1基。 *[[稲荷塚古墳|稲荷塚古墳 (多摩市)]] - [[東京都]][[多摩市]] *[[稲荷塚古墳 (甲府市)]] - [[山梨県]][[甲府市]] *[[古市古墳群|稲荷塚古墳 (羽曳野市)]] - [[大阪府]][[藤井寺市]]。[[古市古墳群]]の1基。 *[[井ノ内稲荷塚古墳]] - [[京都府]][[長岡京市]]
==その他== *[[稲荷森古墳]] - [[山形県]][[南陽市]] *[[稲荷古墳群]] - [[栃木県]][[宇都宮市]] *[[寅稲荷古墳]] - [[埼玉県]][[深谷市]]。[[四十塚古墳群]]の1基。 *[[大稲荷古墳群]]（おおとうかこふんぐん） - 埼玉県[[行田市]] *[[三変稲荷神社古墳]] - 埼玉県[[川越市]]。[[仙波古墳群]]の1基。 *[[鶴ヶ丘稲荷神社古墳]] - 埼玉県[[鶴ヶ島市]] *[[稲荷山公園古墳群]] - 埼玉県[[狭山市]] *[[稲荷台古墳群]] - [[千葉県]][[市原市]] **[[稲荷台1号墳]] *[[祇園・長須賀古墳群|稲荷森古墳 (木更津市)]] - 千葉県[[木更津市]]。[[祇園・長須賀古墳群]]の1基。 *[[稲荷前古墳群]] - [[神奈川県]][[横浜市]] *[[元稲荷古墳]] - [[京都府]][[向日市]]。向日丘陵古墳群の1基。
==関連項目== *[[日本の古墳一覧]]

==概要== [[日本列島]]には「稲荷塚」や「稲荷山」を冠する古墳が数多く存在し、これ以外にも「稲荷森」や「稲荷前」・「稲荷台」など「稲荷」以下が異なる様々な[[バリエーション]]が存在する。
==稲荷山古墳== {{main|稲荷山古墳}} * [[白石稲荷山古墳]] - [[群馬県]][[藤岡市]]。[[白石古墳群]]の1基。 * [[稲荷山古墳 (太田市)]] - 群馬県[[太田市]]。 * 上小塙稲荷山古墳 - 群馬県[[高崎市]]。 * [[風返稲荷山古墳]] - [[茨城県]][[かすみがうら市]]。 * [[稲荷山古墳 (行田市)]] -[[埼玉県]][[行田市]]。[[埼玉古墳群]]の1基。 **[[稲荷山古墳出土鉄剣]] * [[稲荷山古墳 (富津市)]] - [[千葉県]][[富津市]]。[[内裏塚古墳群]]の1基。 * 稲荷山古墳 (牧之原市) - [[静岡県]][[牧之原市]]。 *[[御厨古墳群|稲荷山古墳]] - 静岡県[[磐田市]]。[[御厨古墳群]]の1基。 * [[三ツ井稲荷山古墳]] - [[愛知県]][[一宮市]]。 * [[鴨稲荷山古墳]] - [[滋賀県]][[高島市]]。 * [[稲荷山古墳 (丹波篠山市)]] - [[兵庫県]][[丹波篠山市]]。
==稲荷塚古墳== *[[稲荷塚古墳群]] - [[埼玉県]][[比企郡]][[川島町]] *[[稲荷塚古墳 (嵐山町)]] - [[埼玉県]][[比企郡]][[嵐山町]] *[[樋遣川古墳群|稲荷塚古墳 (加須市)]] - 埼玉県[[加須市]]。[[樋遣川古墳群]]の1基。 *[[稲荷塚古墳|稲荷塚古墳 (多摩市)]] - [[東京都]][[多摩市]] *[[稲荷塚古墳 (甲府市)]] - [[山梨県]][[甲府市]] *[[古市古墳群|稲荷塚古墳 (羽曳野市)]] - [[大阪府]][[藤井寺市]]。[[古市古墳群]]の1基。 *[[井ノ内稲荷塚古墳]] - [[京都府]][[長岡京市]]
==その他== *[[稲荷森古墳]] - [[山形県]][[南陽市]] *[[稲荷古墳群]] - [[栃木県]][[宇都宮市]] *[[寅稲荷古墳]] - [[埼玉県]][[深谷市]]。[[四十塚古墳群]]の1基。 *[[大稲荷古墳群]]（おおとうかこふんぐん） - 埼玉県[[行田市]] *[[三変稲荷神社古墳]] - 埼玉県[[川越市]]。[[仙波古墳群]]の1基。 *[[鶴ヶ丘稲荷神社古墳]] - 埼玉県[[鶴ヶ島市]] *[[稲荷山公園古墳群]] - 埼玉県[[狭山市]] *[[稲荷台古墳群]] - [[千葉県]][[市原市]] **[[稲荷台1号墳]] *[[祇園・長須賀古墳群|稲荷森古墳 (木更津市)]] - 千葉県[[木更津市]]。[[祇園・長須賀古墳群]]の1基。 *[[稲荷前古墳群]] - [[神奈川県]][[横浜市]] *[[元稲荷古墳]] - [[京都府]][[向日市]]。向日丘陵古墳群の1基。
==関連項目== *[[日本の古墳一覧]]
{{考古学}} {{DEFAULTSORT:いなりのつくにほんれつとうのこふんいちらん}} [[Category:日本の古墳一覧]]

Additionally, there are v..."
revision.text:
'''List of Kofun in the Japanese Archipelago with the Name "Inari"''' (「稲荷」の付く日本列島の古墳一覧)
This article provides a list of **kofun** (ancient burial mounds) and **kofun clusters** in the **Japanese Archipelago** whose names include **"Inari"** (稲荷 / とうか / いなり).
== Overview == Throughout **Japan**, there are many kofun with names such as **"Inari-zuka"** (稲荷塚) and **"Inari-yama"** (稲荷山). Additionally, there are variations such as **"Inari-mori"** (稲荷森), **"Inari-mae"** (稲荷前), and **"Inari-dai"** (稲荷台), creating diverse **naming patterns**.
== {{ill|Inari-yama Kofun|ja|稲荷山古墳}} == * {{ill|Shiraishi Inari-yama Kofun|ja|白石稲荷山古墳}} - Located in **Fujioka City, Gunma Prefecture**, part of the **Shiraishi Kofun Cluster**. * {{ill|Inari-yama Kofun (Ōta City)|ja|稲荷山古墳 (太田市)}} - Located in **Ōta City, Gunma Prefecture**. * {{ill|Kamikozuka Inari-yama Kofun|ja|上小塙稲荷山古墳}} - Located in **Takasaki City, Gunma Prefecture**. * {{ill|Kazekaeshi Inari-yama Kofun|ja|風返稲荷山古墳}} - Located in **Kasumigaura City, Ibaraki Prefecture**. * {{ill|Inari-yama Kofun (Gyōda City)|ja|稲荷山古墳 (行田市)}} - Located in **Gyōda City, Saitama Prefecture**, part of the **Saitama Kofun Cluster**. **[[Inariyama Kofun Iron Sword]]** (稲荷山古墳出土鉄剣) * {{ill|Inari-yama Kofun (Futtsu City)|ja|稲荷山古墳 (富津市)}} - Located in **Futtsu City, Chiba Prefecture**, part of the **Dairizuka Kofun Cluster**. * {{ill|Inari-yama Kofun (Makinohara City)|ja|稲荷山古墳 (牧之原市)}} - Located in **Makinohara City, Shizuoka Prefecture**. * {{ill|Mikuriya Kofun Cluster|ja|御厨古墳群}} - Located in **Iwata City, Shizuoka Prefecture**, part of the **Mikuriya Kofun Cluster**. * {{ill|Mitsui Inari-yama Kofun|ja|三ツ井稲荷山古墳}} - Located in **Ichinomiya City, Aichi Prefecture**. * {{ill|Kamo Inari-yama Kofun|ja|鴨稲荷山古墳}} - Located in **Takashima City, Shiga Prefecture**. * {{ill|Inari-yama Kofun (Tamba-Sasayama City)|ja|稲荷山古墳 (丹波篠山市)}} - Located in **Tamba-Sasayama City, Hyogo Prefecture**.
== {{ill|Inari-zuka Kofun|ja|稲荷塚古墳}} == * {{ill|Inari-zuka Kofun Cluster|ja|稲荷塚古墳群}} - Located in **Kawajima Town, Hiki District, Saitama Prefecture**. * {{ill|Inari-zuka Kofun (Ranzan Town)|ja|稲荷塚古墳 (嵐山町)}} - Located in **Ranzan Town, Hiki District, Saitama Prefecture**. * {{ill|Hikizugawa Kofun Cluster|ja|樋遣川古墳群}} - Located in **Kazo City, Saitama Prefecture**, part of the **Hikizugawa Kofun Cluster**. * {{ill|Inari-zuka Kofun (Tama City)|ja|稲荷塚古墳 (多摩市)}} - Located in **Tama City, Tokyo Prefecture**. * {{ill|Inari-zuka Kofun (Kōfu City)|ja|稲荷塚古墳 (甲府市)}} - Located in **Kōfu City, Yamanashi Prefecture**. * {{ill|Inari-zuka Kofun (Habikino City)|ja|稲荷塚古墳 (羽曳野市)}} - Located in **Habikino City, Osaka Prefecture**, part of the **Furuichi Kofun Cluster**. * {{ill|Inouchi Inari-zuka Kofun|ja|井ノ内稲荷塚古墳}} - Located in **Nagaokakyo City, Kyoto Prefecture**.
== Other Kofun == * {{ill|Inari-mori Kofun|ja|稲荷森古墳}} - Located in **Nanyō City, Yamagata Prefecture**. * {{ill|Inari Kofun Cluster|ja|稲荷古墳群}} - Located in **Utsunomiya City, Tochigi Prefecture**. * {{ill|Tora Inari Kofun|ja|寅稲荷古墳}} - Located in **Fukaya City, Saitama Prefecture**, part of the **Shijūzuka Kofun Cluster**. * {{ill|Ōtōka Kofun Cluster|ja|大稲荷古墳群}} - Located in **Gyōda City, Saitama Prefecture**. * {{ill|Sanpei Inari Shrine Kofun|ja|三変稲荷神社古墳}} - Located in **Kawagoe City, Saitama Prefecture**, part of the **Semba Kofun Cluster**. * {{ill|Tsurugaoka Inari Shrine Kofun|ja|鶴ヶ丘稲荷神社古墳}} - Located in **Tsurugashima City, Saitama Prefecture**. * {{ill|Inari-yama Park Kofun Cluster|ja|稲荷山公園古墳群}} - Located in **Sayama City, Saitama Prefecture**. * {{ill|Inari-dai Kofun Cluster|ja|稲荷台古墳群}} - Located in **Ichihara City, Chiba Prefecture**. **[[Inari-dai No.1 Kofun]]** (稲荷台1号墳) * {{ill|Gion-Nagasuga Kofun Cluster|ja|祇園・長須賀古墳群}} - Located in **Kisarazu City, Chiba Prefecture**, part of the **Gion-Nagasuga Kofun Cluster**. * {{ill|Inari-mae Kofun Cluster|ja|稲荷前古墳群}} - Located in **Yokohama City, Kanagawa Prefecture**. * {{ill|Moto Inari Kofun|ja|元稲荷古墳}} - Located in **Muko City, Kyoto Prefecture**, part of the **Muko Hill Kofun Cluster**.
== Related Articles == * {{ill|List of Kofun in Japan|ja|日本の古墳一覧}} * {{ill|List of Kofun in Japan with the Name "Hyō"|ja|「瓢」の付く日本列島の古墳一覧}}
{{Archaeology}} {{DEFAULTSORT:Inari no tsuku Nihon rettō no kofun ichiran}} [[Category:List of Kofun in Japan]] [[Category:Lists in Japanese History]]

This article provides a list of **kofun** (ancient burial mounds) and **kofun clusters** in the **Japanese Archipelago** whose names include **"Inari"** (稲荷 / とうか / いなり).
== Overview == Throughout **Japan**, there are many kofun with names such as **"Inari-zuka"** (稲荷塚) and **"Inari-yama"** (稲荷山). Additionally, there are variations such as **"Inari-mori"** (稲荷森), **"Inari-mae"** (稲荷前), and **"Inari-dai"** (稲荷台), creating diverse **naming patterns**.
== {{ill|Inari-yama Kofun|ja|稲荷山古墳}} == * {{ill|Shiraishi Inari-yama Kofun|ja|白石稲荷山古墳}} - Located in **Fujioka City, Gunma Prefecture**, part of the **Shiraishi Kofun Cluster**. * {{ill|Inari-yama Kofun (Ōta City)|ja|稲荷山古墳 (太田市)}} - Located in **Ōta City, Gunma Prefecture**. * {{ill|Kamikozuka Inari-yama Kofun|ja|上小塙稲荷山古墳}} - Located in **Takasaki City, Gunma Prefecture**. * {{ill|Kazekaeshi Inari-yama Kofun|ja|風返稲荷山古墳}} - Located in **Kasumigaura City, Ibaraki Prefecture**. * {{ill|Inari-yama Kofun (Gyōda City)|ja|稲荷山古墳 (行田市)}} - Located in **Gyōda City, Saitama Prefecture**, part of the **Saitama Kofun Cluster**. **[[Inariyama Kofun Iron Sword]]** (稲荷山古墳出土鉄剣) * {{ill|Inari-yama Kofun (Futtsu City)|ja|稲荷山古墳 (富津市)}} - Located in **Futtsu City, Chiba Prefecture**, part of the **Dairizuka Kofun Cluster**. * {{ill|Inari-yama Kofun (Makinohara City)|ja|稲荷山古墳 (牧之原市)}} - Located in **Makinohara City, Shizuoka Prefecture**. * {{ill|Mikuriya Kofun Cluster|ja|御厨古墳群}} - Located in **Iwata City, Shizuoka Prefecture**, part of the **Mikuriya Kofun Cluster**. * {{ill|Mitsui Inari-yama Kofun|ja|三ツ井稲荷山古墳}} - Located in **Ichinomiya City, Aichi Prefecture**. * {{ill|Kamo Inari-yama Kofun|ja|鴨稲荷山古墳}} - Located in **Takashima City, Shiga Prefecture**. * {{ill|Inari-yama Kofun (Tamba-Sasayama City)|ja|稲荷山古墳 (丹波篠山市)}} - Located in **Tamba-Sasayama City, Hyogo Prefecture**.
== {{ill|Inari-zuka Kofun|ja|稲荷塚古墳}} == * {{ill|Inari-zuka Kofun Cluster|ja|稲荷塚古墳群}} - Located in **Kawajima Town, Hiki District, Saitama Prefecture**. * {{ill|Inari-zuka Kofun (Ranzan Town)|ja|稲荷塚古墳 (嵐山町)}} - Located in **Ranzan Town, Hiki District, Saitama Prefecture**. * {{ill|Hikizugawa Kofun Cluster|ja|樋遣川古墳群}} - Located in **Kazo City, Saitama Prefecture**, part of the **Hikizugawa Kofun Cluster**. * {{ill|Inari-zuka Kofun (Tama City)|ja|稲荷塚古墳 (多摩市)}} - Located in **Tama City, Tokyo Prefecture**. * {{ill|Inari-zuka Kofun (Kōfu City)|ja|稲荷塚古墳 (甲府市)}} - Located in **Kōfu City, Yamanashi Prefecture**. * {{ill|Inari-zuka Kofun (Habikino City)|ja|稲荷塚古墳 (羽曳野市)}} - Located in **Habikino City, Osaka Prefecture**, part of the **Furuichi Kofun Cluster**. * {{ill|Inouchi Inari-zuka Kofun|ja|井ノ内稲荷塚古墳}} - Located in **Nagaokakyo City, Kyoto Prefecture**.

'''List of Kofun in the Japanese Archipelago with the Name "Inari"''' (「稲荷」の付く日本列島の古墳一覧)
This article provides a list of **kofun** (ancient burial mounds) and **kofun clusters** in the **Japanese Archipelago** whose names include **"Inari"** (稲荷 / とうか / いなり).
== Overview == Throughout **Japan**, there are many kofun with names such as **"Inari-zuka"** (稲荷塚) and **"Inari-yama"** (稲荷山). Additionally, there are variations such as **"Inari-mori"** (稲荷森), **"Inari-mae"** (稲荷前), and **"Inari-dai"** (稲荷台), creating diverse **naming patterns**.

'''List of Kofun in the Japanese Archipelago with the Name "Inari"''' (「稲荷」の付く日本列島の古墳一覧)
This article provides a list of **kofun** (ancient burial mounds) and **kofun clusters** in the **Japanese Archipelago** whose names include **"Inari"** (稲荷 / とうか / いなり).
== Overview == Throughout **Japan**, there are many kofun with names such as **"Inari-zuka"** (稲荷塚) and **"Inari-yama"** (稲荷山). Additionally, there are variations such as **"Inari-mori"** (稲荷森), **"Inari-mae"** (稲荷前), and **"Inari-dai"** (稲荷台), creating diverse **naming patterns**.

'''List of Kofun in the Japanese Archipelago with the Name "Inari"''' (「稲荷」の付く日本列島の古墳一覧)
This article provides a list of '''kofun''' (ancient burial mounds) and '''kofun clusters''' in the '''Japanese Archipelago''' whose names include '''"Inari"''' (稲荷 / とうか / いなり).
== Overview == Throughout '''Japan''', there are many kofun with names such as '''"Inari-zuka"''' (稲荷塚) and '''"Inari-yama"''' (稲荷山). Additionally, there are variations such as '''"Inari-mori"''' (稲荷森), '''"Inari-mae"''' (稲荷前), and '''"Inari-dai"''' (稲荷台), creating diverse '''naming patterns'''.

'''List of Kofun in the Japanese Archipelago with the Name "Inari"''' (「稲荷」の付く日本列島の古墳一覧)
This article provides a list of '''kofun''' (ancient burial mounds) and '''kofun clusters''' in the '''Japanese Archipelago''' whose names include '''"Inari"''' (稲荷 / とうか / いなり).
== Overview == Throughout '''Japan''', there are many kofun with names such as '''"Inari-zuka"''' (稲荷塚) and '''"Inari-yama"''' (稲荷山). Additionally, there are variations such as '''"Inari-mori"''' (稲荷森), '''"Inari-mae"''' (稲荷前), and '''"Inari-dai"''' (稲荷台), creating diverse '''naming patterns'''.

revision.text:
'''List of Kofun in the Japanese Archipelago with the Name "Inari"''' (「稲荷」の付く日本列島の古墳一覧)
This article provides a list of '''kofun''' (ancient burial mounds) and '''kofun clusters''' in the '''Japanese Archipelago''' whose names include '''"Inari"''' (稲荷 / とうか / いなり).
== Overview == Throughout '''Japan''', there are many kofun with names such as '''"Inari-zuka"''' (稲荷塚) and '''"Inari-yama"''' (稲荷山). Additionally, there are variations such as '''"Inari-mori"''' (稲荷森), '''"Inari-mae"''' (稲荷前), and '''"Inari-dai"''' (稲荷台), creating diverse '''naming patterns'''.
== {{ill|Inariyama Kofun (disambiguation)|lt=Inariyama Kofun|ja|稲荷山古墳}} == * {{ill|Shiraishi Inari-yama Kofun|ja|白石稲荷山古墳}} - Located in '''Fujioka City, Gunma Prefecture''', part of the '''Shiraishi Kofun Cluster'''. * {{ill|Inari-yama Kofun (Ōta City)|ja|稲荷山古墳 (太田市)}} - Located in '''Ōta City, Gunma Prefecture'''. * {{ill|Kamikozuka Inari-yama Kofun|ja|上小塙稲荷山古墳}} - Located in '''Takasaki City, Gunma Prefecture'''. * {{ill|Kazekaeshi Inari-yama Kofun|ja|風返稲荷山古墳}} - Located in '''Kasumigaura City, Ibaraki Prefecture'''. * {{ill|Inariyama Kofun|ja|稲荷山古墳 (行田市)}} - Located in '''Gyōda City, Saitama Prefecture''', part of the '''Saitama Kofun Cluster'''. ** [[Inariyama Sword|Inariyama Kofun Iron Sword]]''' (稲荷山古墳出土鉄剣)'''
* {{ill|Inari-yama Kofun (Futtsu City)|ja|稲荷山古墳 (富津市)}} - Located in '''Futtsu City, Chiba Prefecture''', part of the '''Dairizuka Kofun Cluster'''. * {{ill|Inari-yama Kofun (Makinohara City)|ja|稲荷山古墳 (牧之原市)}} - Located in '''Makinohara City, Shizuoka Prefecture'''. * {{ill|Mikuriya Kofun Cluster|ja|御厨古墳群}} - Located in '''Iwata City, Shizuoka Prefecture''', part of the '''Mikuriya Kofun Cluster'''. * {{ill|Mitsui Inari-yama Kofun|ja|三ツ井稲荷山古墳}} - Located in '''Ichinomiya City, Aichi Prefecture'''. * {{ill|Kamo Inari-yama Kofun|ja|鴨稲荷山古墳}} - Located in '''Takashima City, Shiga Prefecture'''. * {{ill|Inari-yama Kofun (Tamba-Sasayama City)|ja|稲荷山古墳 (丹波篠山市)}} - Located in '''Tamba-Sasayama City, Hyogo Prefecture'''.
== {{ill|Inari-zuka Kofun|ja|稲荷塚古墳}} == * {{ill|Inarizuka Kofun|ja|稲荷塚古墳}} - A rare {{ill|Octagonal Kofun|ja|八角墳}} * {{ill|Inari-zuka Kofun Cluster|ja|稲荷塚古墳群}} - Located in '''Kawajima Town, Hiki District, Saitama Prefecture'''. * {{ill|Inari-zuka Kofun (Ranzan Town)|ja|稲荷塚古墳 (嵐山町)}} - Located in '''Ranzan Town, Hiki District, Saitama Prefecture'''. * {{ill|Hikizugawa Kofun Cluster|ja|樋遣川古墳群}} - Located in '''Kazo City, Saitama Prefecture''', part of the '''Hikizugawa Kofun Cluster'''. * {{ill|Inari-zuka Kofun (Tama City)|ja|稲荷塚古墳 (多摩市)}} - Located in '''Tama City, Tokyo Prefecture'''. * {{ill|Inari-zuka Kofun (Kōfu City)|ja|稲荷塚古墳 (甲府市)}} - Located in '''Kōfu City, Yamanashi Prefecture'''. * {{ill|Inari-zuka Kofun (Habikino City)|ja|稲荷塚古墳 (羽曳野市)}} - Located in '''Habikino City, Osaka Prefecture''', part of the '''Furuichi Kofun Cluster'''. * {{ill|Inouchi Inari-zuka Kofun|ja|井ノ内稲荷塚古墳}} - Located in '''Nagaokakyo City, Kyoto Prefecture'''.
== Other Kofun == * {{ill|Inari-mori Kofun|ja|稲荷森古墳}} - Located in '''Nanyō City, Yamagata Prefecture'''. * {{ill|Inari Kofun Cluster|ja|稲荷古墳群}} - Located in '''Utsunomiya City, Tochigi Prefecture'''. * {{ill|Tora Inari Kofun|ja|寅稲荷古墳}} - Located in '''Fukaya City, Saitama Prefecture''', part of the '''Shijūzuka Kofun Cluster'''. * {{ill|Ōtōka Kofun Cluster|ja|大稲荷古墳群}} - Located in '''Gyōda City, Saitama Prefecture'''. * {{ill|Sanpei Inari Shrine Kofun|ja|三変稲荷神社古墳}} - Located in '''Kawagoe City, Saitama Prefecture''', part of the '''Semba Kofun Cluster'''. * {{ill|Tsurugaoka Inari Shrine Kofun|ja|鶴ヶ丘稲荷神社古墳}} - Located in '''Tsurugashima City, Saitama Prefecture'''. * {{ill|Inari-yama Park Kofun Cluster|ja|稲荷山公園古墳群}} - Located in '''Sayama City, Saitama Prefecture'''. * {{ill|Inaridai Kofun Group|ja|稲荷台古墳群|en}} - Located in '''Ichihara City, Chiba Prefecture'''. ** {{ill|Inaridai No.1 Kofun|ja|稲荷台1号墳}}''' (稲荷台1号墳)'''
* {{ill|Gion-Nagasuga Kofun Cluster|ja|祇園・長須賀古墳群}} - Located in '''Kisarazu City, Chiba Prefecture''', part of the '''Gion-Nagasuga Kofun Cluster'''. * {{ill|Inari-mae Kofun Cluster|ja|稲荷前古墳群}} - Located in '''Yokohama City, Kanagawa Prefecture'''. * {{ill|Motoinari Kofun|ja|元稲荷古墳}} - Located in '''Muko City, Kyoto Prefecture''', part of the '''Muko Hill Kofun Cluster'''.

'''List of Kofun in the Japanese Archipelago with the Name "Inari"''' (「稲荷」の付く日本列島の古墳一覧)
This article provides a list of '''kofun''' (ancient burial mounds) and '''kofun clusters''' in the '''Japanese Archipelago''' whose names include '''"Inari"''' (稲荷 / とうか / いなり).
== Overview == Throughout '''Japan''', there are many kofun with names such as '''"Inari-zuka"''' (稲荷塚) and '''"Inari-yama"''' (稲荷山). Additionally, there are variations such as '''"Inari-mori"''' (稲荷森), '''"Inari-mae"''' (稲荷前), and '''"Inari-dai"''' (稲荷台), creating diverse '''naming patterns'''.

* {{ill|Inari-yama Kofun (Futtsu City)|ja|稲荷山古墳 (富津市)}} - Located in '''Futtsu City, Chiba Prefecture''', part of the '''Dairizuka Kofun Cluster'''. * {{ill|Inari-yama Kofun (Makinohara City)|ja|稲荷山古墳 (牧之原市)}} - Located in '''Makinohara City, Shizuoka Prefecture'''. * {{ill|Mikuriya Kofun Cluster|ja|御厨古墳群}} - Located in '''Iwata City, Shizuoka Prefecture''', part of the '''Mikuriya Kofun Cluster'''. * {{ill|Mitsui Inari-yama Kofun|ja|三ツ井稲荷山古墳}} - Located in '''Ichinomiya City, Aichi Prefecture'''. * {{ill|Kamo Inari-yama Kofun|ja|鴨稲荷山古墳}} - Located in '''Takashima City, Shiga Prefecture'''. * {{ill|Inari-yama Kofun (Tamba-Sasayama City)|ja|稲荷山古墳 (丹波篠山市)}} - Located in '''Tamba-Sasayama City, Hyogo Prefecture'''.

'''List of Kofun in the Japanese Archipelago with the Name "Inari"''' (「稲荷」の付く日本列島の古墳一覧)
This article provides a list of '''kofun''' (ancient Kofuns) and '''kofun clusters''' in the '''Japanese Archipelago''' whose names include '''"Inari"''' (稲荷 / とうか / いなり).
== Overview == Throughout '''Japan''', there are many kofun with names such as '''"Inari-zuka"''' (稲荷塚) and '''"Inari-yama"''' (稲荷山). Additionally, there are variations such as '''"Inari-mori"''' (稲荷森), '''"Inari-mae"''' (稲荷前), and '''"Inari-dai"''' (稲荷台), creating diverse '''naming patterns'''.

'''List of Kofun in the Japanese Archipelago with the Name "Inari"''' (「稲荷」の付く日本列島の古墳一覧)
This article provides a list of '''kofun''' (ancient Kofuns) and '''kofun clusters''' in the '''Japanese Archipelago''' whose names include '''"Inari"''' (稲荷 / とうか / いなり).
== Overview == Throughout '''Japan''', there are many kofun with names such as '''"Inari-zuka"''' (稲荷塚) and '''"Inari-yama"''' (稲荷山). Additionally, there are variations such as '''"Inari-mori"''' (稲荷森), '''"Inari-mae"''' (稲荷前), and '''"Inari-dai"''' (稲荷台), creating diverse '''naming patterns'''.
== {{ill|Inariyama Kofun (disambiguation)|lt=Inariyama Kofun|ja|稲荷山古墳}} == * {{ill|Shiraishi Inari-yama Kofun|ja|白石稲荷山古墳}} - Located in '''Fujioka City, Gunma Prefecture''', part of the '''Shiraishi Kofun Cluster'''. * {{ill|Inari-yama Kofun (Ōta City)|ja|稲荷山古墳 (太田市)}} - Located in '''Ōta City, Gunma Prefecture'''. * {{ill|Kamikozuka Inari-yama Kofun|ja|上小塙稲荷山古墳}} - Located in '''Takasaki City, Gunma Prefecture'''. * {{ill|Kazekaeshi Inari-yama Kofun|ja|風返稲荷山古墳}} - Located in '''Kasumigaura City, Ibaraki Prefecture'''. * {{ill|Inariyama Kofun|ja|稲荷山古墳 (行田市)}} - Located in '''Gyōda City, Saitama Prefecture''', part of the '''Saitama Kofun Cluster'''. ** [[Inariyama Sword|Inariyama Kofun Iron Sword]]''' (稲荷山古墳出土鉄剣)'''
* {{ill|Inari-yama Kofun (Futtsu City)|ja|稲荷山古墳 (富津市)}} - Located in '''Futtsu City, Chiba Prefecture''', part of the '''Dairizuka Kofun Cluster'''. * {{ill|Inari-yama Kofun (Makinohara City)|ja|稲荷山古墳 (牧之原市)}} - Located in '''Makinohara City, Shizuoka Prefecture'''. * {{ill|Mikuriya Kofun Cluster|ja|御厨古墳群}} - Located in '''Iwata City, Shizuoka Prefecture''', part of the '''Mikuriya Kofun Cluster'''. * {{ill|Mitsui Inari-yama Kofun|ja|三ツ井稲荷山古墳}} - Located in '''Ichinomiya City, Aichi Prefecture'''. * {{ill|Kamo Inari-yama Kofun|ja|鴨稲荷山古墳}} - Located in '''Takashima City, Shiga Prefecture'''. * {{ill|Inari-yama Kofun (Tamba-Sasayama City)|ja|稲荷山古墳 (丹波篠山市)}} - Located in '''Tamba-Sasayama City, Hyogo Prefecture'''.
== {{ill|Inari-zuka Kofun|ja|稲荷塚古墳}} == * {{ill|Inarizuka Kofun|ja|稲荷塚古墳}} - A rare {{ill|Octagonal Kofun|ja|八角墳|1=Octagonal Kofun}} * {{ill|Inari-zuka Kofun Cluster|ja|稲荷塚古墳群}} - Located in '''Kawajima Town, Hiki District, Saitama Prefecture'''. * {{ill|Inari-zuka Kofun (Ranzan Town)|ja|稲荷塚古墳 (嵐山町)}} - Located in '''Ranzan Town, Hiki District, Saitama Prefecture'''. * {{ill|Hikizugawa Kofun Cluster|ja|樋遣川古墳群}} - Located in '''Kazo City, Saitama Prefecture''', part of the '''Hikizugawa Kofun Cluster'''. * {{ill|Inari-zuka Kofun (Tama City)|ja|稲荷塚古墳 (多摩市)}} - Located in '''Tama City, Tokyo Prefecture'''. * {{ill|Inari-zuka Kofun (Kōfu City)|ja|稲荷塚古墳 (甲府市)}} - Located in '''Kōfu City, Yamanashi Prefecture'''. * {{ill|Inari-zuka Kofun (Habikino City)|ja|稲荷塚古墳 (羽曳野市)}} - Located in '''Habikino City, Osaka Prefecture''', part of the '''Furuichi Kofun Cluster'''. * {{ill|Inouchi Inari-zuka Kofun|ja|井ノ内稲荷塚古墳}} - Located in '''Nagaokakyo City, Kyoto Prefecture'''.
== Other Kofun == * {{ill|Inari-mori Kofun|ja|稲荷森古墳}} - Located in '''Nanyō City, Yamagata Prefecture'''. * {{ill|Inari Kofun Cluster|ja|稲荷古墳群}} - Located in '''Utsunomiya City, Tochigi Prefecture'''. * {{ill|Tora Inari Kofun|ja|寅稲荷古墳}} - Located in '''Fukaya City, Saitama Prefecture''', part of the '''Shijūzuka Kofun Cluster'''. * {{ill|Ōtōka Kofun Cluster|ja|大稲荷古墳群}} - Located in '''Gyōda City, Saitama Prefecture'''. * {{ill|Sanpei Inari Shrine Kofun|ja|三変稲荷神社古墳}} - Located in '''Kawagoe City, Saitama Prefecture''', part of the '''Semba Kofun Cluster'''. * {{ill|Tsurugaoka Inari Shrine Kofun|ja|鶴ヶ丘稲荷神社古墳}} - Located in '''Tsurugashima City, Saitama Prefecture'''. * {{ill|Inari-yama Park Kofun Cluster|ja|稲荷山公園古墳群}} - Located in '''Sayama City, Saitama Prefecture'''. * {{ill|Inaridai Kofun Group|ja|稲荷台古墳群|en}} - Located in '''Ichihara City, Chiba Prefecture'''. ** {{ill|Inaridai No.1 Kofun|ja|稲荷台1号墳}}''' (稲荷台1号墳)'''
* {{ill|Gion-Nagasuga Kofun Cluster|ja|祇園・長須賀古墳群}} - Located in '''Kisarazu City, Chiba Prefecture''', part of the '''Gion-Nagasuga Kofun Cluster'''. * {{ill|Inari-mae Kofun Cluster|ja|稲荷前古墳群}} - Located in '''Yokohama City, Kanagawa Prefecture'''. * {{ill|Motoinari Kofun|ja|元稲荷古墳}} - Located in '''Muko City, Kyoto Prefecture''', part of the '''Muko Hill Kofun Cluster'''.

'''List of Kofun in the Japanese Archipelago with the Name "Inari"''' (「稲荷」の付く日本列島の古墳一覧)
This article provides a list of '''kofun''' (ancient Kofuns) and '''kofun clusters''' in the '''Japanese Archipelago''' whose names include '''"Inari"''' (稲荷 / とうか / いなり).
== Overview == Throughout '''Japan''', there are many kofun with names such as '''"Inari-zuka"''' (稲荷塚) and '''"Inari-yama"''' (稲荷山). Additionally, there are variations such as '''"Inari-mori"''' (稲荷森), '''"Inari-mae"''' (稲荷前), and '''"Inari-dai"''' (稲荷台), creating diverse '''naming patterns'''.

revision.text:
'''List of Kofun in the Japanese Archipelago with the Name "Inari"''' (「稲荷」の付く日本列島の古墳一覧)
This article provides a list of '''kofun''' (ancient Kofuns) and '''kofun clusters''' in the '''Japanese Archipelago''' whose names include '''"Inari"''' (稲荷 / とうか / いなり).
== Overview == Throughout '''Japan''', there are many kofun with names such as '''"Inari-zuka"''' (稲荷塚) and '''"Inari-yama"''' (稲荷山). Additionally, there are variations such as '''"Inari-mori"''' (稲荷森), '''"Inari-mae"''' (稲荷前), and '''"Inari-dai"''' (稲荷台), creating diverse '''naming patterns'''.
== {{ill|Inariyama Kofun (disambiguation)|lt=Inariyama Kofun|ja|稲荷山古墳|12=draft}} == * {{ill|Shiraishi Inari-yama Kofun|ja|白石稲荷山古墳|12=draft}} - Located in '''Fujioka City, Gunma Prefecture''', part of the '''Shiraishi Kofun Cluster'''. * {{ill|Inari-yama Kofun (Ōta City)|ja|稲荷山古墳 (太田市)|12=draft}} - Located in '''Ōta City, Gunma Prefecture'''. * {{ill|Kamikozuka Inari-yama Kofun|ja|上小塙稲荷山古墳|12=draft}} - Located in '''Takasaki City, Gunma Prefecture'''. * {{ill|Kazekaeshi Inari-yama Kofun|ja|風返稲荷山古墳|12=draft}} - Located in '''Kasumigaura City, Ibaraki Prefecture'''. * {{ill|Inariyama Kofun|ja|稲荷山古墳 (行田市)|12=draft}} - Located in '''Gyōda City, Saitama Prefecture''', part of the '''Saitama Kofun Cluster'''. ** [[Inariyama Sword|Inariyama Kofun Iron Sword]]''' (稲荷山古墳出土鉄剣)'''
* {{ill|Inari-yama Kofun (Futtsu City)|ja|稲荷山古墳 (富津市)|12=draft}} - Located in '''Futtsu City, Chiba Prefecture''', part of the '''Dairizuka Kofun Cluster'''. * {{ill|Inari-yama Kofun (Makinohara City)|ja|稲荷山古墳 (牧之原市)|12=draft}} - Located in '''Makinohara City, Shizuoka Prefecture'''. * {{ill|Mikuriya Kofun Cluster|ja|御厨古墳群|12=draft}} - Located in '''Iwata City, Shizuoka Prefecture''', part of the '''Mikuriya Kofun Cluster'''. * {{ill|Mitsui Inari-yama Kofun|ja|三ツ井稲荷山古墳|12=draft}} - Located in '''Ichinomiya City, Aichi Prefecture'''. * {{ill|Kamo Inari-yama Kofun|ja|鴨稲荷山古墳|12=draft}} - Located in '''Takashima City, Shiga Prefecture'''. * {{ill|Inari-yama Kofun (Tamba-Sasayama City)|ja|稲荷山古墳 (丹波篠山市)|12=draft}} - Located in '''Tamba-Sasayama City, Hyogo Prefecture'''.

== Other Kofun == * {{ill|Inari-mori Kofun|ja|稲荷森古墳|12=draft}} - Located in '''Nanyō City, Yamagata Prefecture'''. * {{ill|Inari Kofun Cluster|ja|稲荷古墳群|12=draft}} - Located in '''Utsunomiya City, Tochigi Prefecture'''. * {{ill|Tora Inari Kofun|ja|寅稲荷古墳|12=draft}} - Located in '''Fukaya City, Saitama Prefecture''', part of the '''Shijūzuka Kofun Cluster'''. * {{ill|Ōtōka Kofun Cluster|ja|大稲荷古墳群|12=draft}} - Located in '''Gyōda City, Saitama Prefecture'''. * {{ill|Sanpei Inari Shrine Kofun|ja|三変稲荷神社古墳|12=draft}} - Located in '''Kawagoe City, Saitama Prefecture''', part of the '''Semba Kofun Cluster'''. * {{ill|Tsurugaoka Inari Shrine Kofun|ja|鶴ヶ丘稲荷神社古墳|12=draft}} - Located in '''Tsurugashima City, Saitama Prefecture'''. * {{ill|Inari-yama Park Kofun Cluster|ja|稲荷山公園古墳群|12=draft}} - Located in '''Sayama City, Saitama Prefecture'''. * {{ill|Inaridai Kofun Group|ja|稲荷台古墳群|en|12=draft}} - Located in '''Ichihara City, Chiba Prefecture'''. ** {{ill|Inaridai No.1 Kofun|ja|稲荷台1号墳|12=draft}}''' (稲荷台1号墳)'''

This article provides a list of '''kofun''' (ancient Kofuns) and '''kofun clusters''' in the '''Japanese Archipelago''' whose names include '''"Inari"''' (稲荷 / とうか / いなり).

This article provides a list of '''kofun''' (ancient Kofuns) and '''kofun clusters''' in the '''Japanese Archipelago''' whose names include '''"Inari"''' (稲荷 / とうか / いなり).
== Overview == Throughout '''Japan''', there are many kofun with names such as '''"Inari-zuka"''' (稲荷塚) and '''"Inari-yama"''' (稲荷山). Additionally, there are variations such as '''"Inari-mori"''' (稲荷森), '''"Inari-mae"''' (稲荷前), and '''"Inari-dai"''' (稲荷台), creating diverse '''naming patterns'''.
== {{ill|Inariyama Kofun (disambiguation)|lt=Inariyama Kofun|ja|稲荷山古墳|12=draft}} == * {{ill|Shiraishi Inari-yama Kofun|ja|白石稲荷山古墳|12=draft}} - Located in '''Fujioka City, Gunma Prefecture''', part of the '''Shiraishi Kofun Cluster'''. * {{ill|Inari-yama Kofun (Ōta City)|ja|稲荷山古墳 (太田市)|12=draft}} - Located in '''Ōta City, Gunma Prefecture'''. * {{ill|Kamikozuka Inari-yama Kofun|ja|上小塙稲荷山古墳|12=draft}} - Located in '''Takasaki City, Gunma Prefecture'''. * {{ill|Kazekaeshi Inari-yama Kofun|ja|風返稲荷山古墳|12=draft}} - Located in '''Kasumigaura City, Ibaraki Prefecture'''. * {{ill|Inariyama Kofun|ja|稲荷山古墳 (行田市)|12=draft}} - Located in '''Gyōda City, Saitama Prefecture''', part of the '''Saitama Kofun Cluster'''. ** [[Inariyama Sword|Inariyama Kofun Iron Sword]]''' (稲荷山古墳出土鉄剣)'''
* {{ill|Inari-yama Kofun (Futtsu City)|ja|稲荷山古墳 (富津市)|12=draft}} - Located in '''Futtsu City, Chiba Prefecture''', part of the '''Dairizuka Kofun Cluster'''. * {{ill|Inari-yama Kofun (Makinohara City)|ja|稲荷山古墳 (牧之原市)|12=draft}} - Located in '''Makinohara City, Shizuoka Prefecture'''. * {{ill|Mikuriya Kofun Cluster|ja|御厨古墳群|12=draft}} - Located in '''Iwata City, Shizuoka Prefecture''', part of the '''Mikuriya Kofun Cluster'''. * {{ill|Mitsui Inari-yama Kofun|ja|三ツ井稲荷山古墳|12=draft}} - Located in '''Ichinomiya City, Aichi Prefecture'''. * {{ill|Kamo Inari-yama Kofun|ja|鴨稲荷山古墳|12=draft}} - Located in '''Takashima City, Shiga Prefecture'''. * {{ill|Inari-yama Kofun (Tamba-Sasayama City)|ja|稲荷山古墳 (丹波篠山市)|12=draft}} - Located in '''Tamba-Sasayama City, Hyogo Prefecture'''.
== {{ill|Inari-zuka Kofun|ja|稲荷塚古墳|12=draft}} == * {{ill|Inarizuka Kofun|ja|稲荷塚古墳|12=draft}} - A rare {{ill|Octagonal Kofun|ja|八角墳|1=Octagonal Kofun|12=draft}} * {{ill|Inari-zuka Kofun Cluster|ja|稲荷塚古墳群|12=draft}} - Located in '''Kawajima Town, Hiki District, Saitama Prefecture'''. * {{ill|Inari-zuka Kofun (Ranzan Town)|ja|稲荷塚古墳 (嵐山町)|12=draft}} - Located in '''Ranzan Town, Hiki District, Saitama Prefecture'''. * {{ill|Hikizugawa Kofun Cluster|ja|樋遣川古墳群|12=draft}} - Located in '''Kazo City, Saitama Prefecture''', part of the '''Hikizugawa Kofun Cluster'''. * {{ill|Inari-zuka Kofun (Tama City)|ja|稲荷塚古墳 (多摩市)|12=draft}} - Located in '''Tama City, Tokyo Prefecture'''. * {{ill|Inari-zuka Kofun (Kōfu City)|ja|稲荷塚古墳 (甲府市)|12=draft}} - Located in '''Kōfu City, Yamanashi Prefecture'''. * {{ill|Inari-zuka Kofun (Habikino City)|ja|稲荷塚古墳 (羽曳野市)|12=draft}} - Located in '''Habikino City, Osaka Prefecture''', part of the '''Furuichi Kofun Cluster'''. * {{ill|Inouchi Inari-zuka Kofun|ja|井ノ内稲荷塚古墳|12=draft}} - Located in '''Nagaokakyo City, Kyoto Prefecture'''.
== Other Kofun == * {{ill|Inari-mori Kofun|ja|稲荷森古墳|12=draft}} - Located in '''Nanyō City, Yamagata Prefecture'''. * {{ill|Inari Kofun Cluster|ja|稲荷古墳群|12=draft}} - Located in '''Utsunomiya City, Tochigi Prefecture'''. * {{ill|Tora Inari Kofun|ja|寅稲荷古墳|12=draft}} - Located in '''Fukaya City, Saitama Prefecture''', part of the '''Shijūzuka Kofun Cluster'''. * {{ill|Ōtōka Kofun Cluster|ja|大稲荷古墳群|12=draft}} - Located in '''Gyōda City, Saitama Prefecture'''. * {{ill|Sanpei Inari Shrine Kofun|ja|三変稲荷神社古墳|12=draft}} - Located in '''Kawagoe City, Saitama Prefecture''', part of the '''Semba Kofun Cluster'''. * {{ill|Tsurugaoka Inari Shrine Kofun|ja|鶴ヶ丘稲荷神社古墳|12=draft}} - Located in '''Tsurugashima City, Saitama Prefecture'''. * {{ill|Inari-yama Park Kofun Cluster|ja|稲荷山公園古墳群|12=draft}} - Located in '''Sayama City, Saitama Prefecture'''. * {{ill|Inaridai Kofun Group|ja|稲荷台古墳群|en|12=draft}} - Located in '''Ichihara City, Chiba Prefecture'''. ** {{ill|Inaridai No.1 Kofun|ja|稲荷台1号墳|12=draft}}''' (稲荷台1号墳)'''
* {{ill|Gion-Nagasuga Kofun Cluster|ja|祇園・長須賀古墳群|12=draft}} - Located in '''Kisarazu City, Chiba Prefecture''', part of the '''Gion-Nagasuga Kofun Cluster'''. * {{ill|Inari-mae Kofun Cluster|ja|稲荷前古墳群|12=draft}} - Located in '''Yokohama City, Kanagawa Prefecture'''. * {{ill|Motoinari Kofun|ja|元稲荷古墳|12=draft}} - Located in '''Muko City, Kyoto Prefecture''', part of the '''Muko Hill Kofun Cluster'''.
== Related Articles == * {{ill|List of Kofun in Japan|ja|日本の古墳一覧|12=draft}} * {{ill|List of Kofun in Japan with the Name "Hyō"|ja|「瓢」の付く日本列島の古墳一覧|12=draft}}

7 revisions imported: Bot: import full history from ja:「稲荷」の付く日本列島の古墳一覧 up to rev 98599555
revision.text:
'''「稲荷」の付く日本列島の古墳一覧'''（いなりのつくにほんれっとうのこふんいちらん）とする本項では、名称に「稲荷」（いなり/とうか）が付く[[日本列島]]の[[古墳時代]]の[[古墳]]および[[古墳群]]について一覧化する。
==概要== [[日本列島]]には「稲荷塚」や「稲荷山」を冠する古墳が数多く存在し、これ以外にも「稲荷森」や「稲荷前」・「稲荷台」など「稲荷」以下が異なる様々な[[バリエーション]]が存在する。
==稲荷山古墳== {{main|稲荷山古墳}} * [[白石稲荷山古墳]] - [[群馬県]][[藤岡市]]。[[白石古墳群]]の1基。 * [[稲荷山古墳 (太田市)]] - 群馬県[[太田市]]。 * 上小塙稲荷山古墳 - 群馬県[[高崎市]]。 * [[風返稲荷山古墳]] - [[茨城県]][[かすみがうら市]]。 * [[稲荷山古墳 (行田市)]] -[[埼玉県]][[行田市]]。[[埼玉古墳群]]の1基。 **[[稲荷山古墳出土鉄剣]] * [[稲荷山古墳 (富津市)]] - [[千葉県]][[富津市]]。[[内裏塚古墳群]]の1基。 * 稲荷山古墳 (牧之原市) - [[静岡県]][[牧之原市]]。 *[[御厨古墳群|稲荷山古墳]] - 静岡県[[磐田市]]。[[御厨古墳群]]の1基。 * [[三ツ井稲荷山古墳]] - [[愛知県]][[一宮市]]。 * [[鴨稲荷山古墳]] - [[滋賀県]][[高島市]]。 * [[稲荷山古墳 (丹波篠山市)]] - [[兵庫県]][[丹波篠山市]]。
==稲荷塚古墳== *[[稲荷塚古墳群]] - [[埼玉県]][[比企郡]][[川島町]] *[[稲荷塚古墳 (嵐山町)]] - [[埼玉県]][[比企郡]][[嵐山町]] *[[樋遣川古墳群|稲荷塚古墳 (加須市)]] - 埼玉県[[加須市]]。[[樋遣川古墳群]]の1基。 *[[稲荷塚古墳|稲荷塚古墳 (多摩市)]] - [[東京都]][[多摩市]] *[[稲荷塚古墳 (甲府市)]] - [[山梨県]][[甲府市]] *[[古市古墳群|稲荷塚古墳 (羽曳野市)]] - [[大阪府]][[藤井寺市]]。[[古市古墳群]]の1基。 *[[井ノ内稲荷塚古墳]] - [[京都府]][[長岡京市]]
==その他== *[[稲荷森古墳]] - [[山形県]][[南陽市]] *[[稲荷古墳群]] - [[栃木県]][[宇都宮市]] *[[寅稲荷古墳]] - [[埼玉県]][[深谷市]]。[[四十塚古墳群]]の1基。 *[[大稲荷古墳群]]（おおとうかこふんぐん） - 埼玉県[[行田市]] *[[三変稲荷神社古墳]] - 埼玉県[[川越市]]。[[仙波古墳群]]の1基。 *[[鶴ヶ丘稲荷神社古墳]] - 埼玉県[[鶴ヶ島市]] *[[稲荷山公園古墳群]] - 埼玉県[[狭山市]] *[[稲荷台古墳群]] - [[千葉県]][[市原市]] **[[稲荷台1号墳]] *[[祇園・長須賀古墳群|稲荷森古墳 (木更津市)]] - 千葉県[[木更津市]]。[[祇園・長須賀古墳群]]の1基。 *[[稲荷前古墳群]] - [[神奈川県]][[横浜市]] *[[元稲荷古墳]] - [[京都府]][[向日市]]。向日丘陵古墳群の1基。
==関連項目== *[[日本の古墳一覧]] *[[「瓢」の付く日本列島の古墳一覧]] {{考古学}} {{DEFAULTSORT:いなりのつくにほんれつとうのこふんいちらん}} [[Category:日本の古墳一覧]] [[Category:日本史の一覧]]

'''List of Kofun in the Japanese Archipelago with the Name "Inari"''' (「稲荷」の付く日本列島の古墳一覧)
This article provides a list of '''kofun''' (ancient Kofuns) and '''kofun clusters''' in the '''Japanese Archipelago''' whose names include '''"Inari"''' (稲荷 / とうか / いなり).
== Overview == Throughout '''Japan''', there are many kofun with names such as '''"Inari-zuka"''' (稲荷塚) and '''"Inari-yama"''' (稲荷山). Additionally, there are variations such as '''"Inari-mori"''' (稲荷森), '''"Inari-mae"''' (稲荷前), and '''"Inari-dai"''' (稲荷台), creating diverse '''naming patterns'''.
== {{ill|Inariyama Kofun (disambiguation)|lt=Inariyama Kofun|ja|稲荷山古墳|qq=draft}} == * {{ill|Shiraishi Inari-yama Kofun|ja|白石稲荷山古墳|qq=draft}} - Located in '''Fujioka City, Gunma Prefecture''', part of the '''Shiraishi Kofun Cluster'''. * {{ill|Inari-yama Kofun (Ōta City)|ja|稲荷山古墳 (太田市)|qq=draft}} - Located in '''Ōta City, Gunma Prefecture'''. * {{ill|Kamikozuka Inari-yama Kofun|ja|上小塙稲荷山古墳|qq=draft}} - Located in '''Takasaki City, Gunma Prefecture'''. * {{ill|Kazekaeshi Inari-yama Kofun|ja|風返稲荷山古墳|qq=draft}} - Located in '''Kasumigaura City, Ibaraki Prefecture'''. * {{ill|Inariyama Kofun|ja|稲荷山古墳 (行田市)|qq=draft}} - Located in '''Gyōda City, Saitama Prefecture''', part of the '''Saitama Kofun Cluster'''. ** [[Inariyama Sword|Inariyama Kofun Iron Sword]]''' (稲荷山古墳出土鉄剣)'''
* {{ill|Inari-yama Kofun (Futtsu City)|ja|稲荷山古墳 (富津市)|qq=draft}} - Located in '''Futtsu City, Chiba Prefecture''', part of the '''Dairizuka Kofun Cluster'''. * {{ill|Inari-yama Kofun (Makinohara City)|ja|稲荷山古墳 (牧之原市)|qq=draft}} - Located in '''Makinohara City, Shizuoka Prefecture'''. * {{ill|Mikuriya Kofun Cluster|ja|御厨古墳群|qq=draft}} - Located in '''Iwata City, Shizuoka Prefecture''', part of the '''Mikuriya Kofun Cluster'''. * {{ill|Mitsui Inari-yama Kofun|ja|三ツ井稲荷山古墳|qq=draft}} - Located in '''Ichinomiya City, Aichi Prefecture'''. * {{ill|Kamo Inari-yama Kofun|ja|鴨稲荷山古墳|qq=draft}} - Located in '''Takashima City, Shiga Prefecture'''. * {{ill|Inari-yama Kofun (Tamba-Sasayama City)|ja|稲荷山古墳 (丹波篠山市)|qq=draft}} - Located in '''Tamba-Sasayama City, Hyogo Prefecture'''.
== {{ill|Inari-zuka Kofun|ja|稲荷塚古墳|qq=draft}} == * {{ill|Inarizuka Kofun|ja|稲荷塚古墳|qq=draft}} - A rare {{ill|Octagonal Kofun|ja|八角墳|1=Octagonal Kofun|qq=draft}} * {{ill|Inari-zuka Kofun Cluster|ja|稲荷塚古墳群|qq=draft}} - Located in '''Kawajima Town, Hiki District, Saitama Prefecture'''. * {{ill|Inari-zuka Kofun (Ranzan Town)|ja|稲荷塚古墳 (嵐山町)|qq=draft}} - Located in '''Ranzan Town, Hiki District, Saitama Prefecture'''. * {{ill|Hikizugawa Kofun Cluster|ja|樋遣川古墳群|qq=draft}} - Located in '''Kazo City, Saitama Prefecture''', part of the '''Hikizugawa Kofun Cluster'''. * {{ill|Inari-zuka Kofun (Tama City)|ja|稲荷塚古墳 (多摩市)|qq=draft}} - Located in '''Tama City, Tokyo Prefecture'''. * {{ill|Inari-zuka Kofun (Kōfu City)|ja|稲荷塚古墳 (甲府市)|qq=draft}} - Located in '''Kōfu City, Yamanashi Prefecture'''. * {{ill|Inari-zuka Kofun (Habikino City)|ja|稲荷塚古墳 (羽曳野市)|qq=draft}} - Located in '''Habikino City, Osaka Prefecture''', part of the '''Furuichi Kofun Cluster'''. * {{ill|Inouchi Inari-zuka Kofun|ja|井ノ内稲荷塚古墳|qq=draft}} - Located in '''Nagaokakyo City, Kyoto Prefecture'''.
== Other Kofun == * {{ill|Inari-mori Kofun|ja|稲荷森古墳|qq=draft}} - Located in '''Nanyō City, Yamagata Prefecture'''. * {{ill|Inari Kofun Cluster|ja|稲荷古墳群|qq=draft}} - Located in '''Utsunomiya City, Tochigi Prefecture'''. * {{ill|Tora Inari Kofun|ja|寅稲荷古墳|qq=draft}} - Located in '''Fukaya City, Saitama Prefecture''', part of the '''Shijūzuka Kofun Cluster'''. * {{ill|Ōtōka Kofun Cluster|ja|大稲荷古墳群|qq=draft}} - Located in '''Gyōda City, Saitama Prefecture'''. * {{ill|Sanpei Inari Shrine Kofun|ja|三変稲荷神社古墳|qq=draft}} - Located in '''Kawagoe City, Saitama Prefecture''', part of the '''Semba Kofun Cluster'''. * {{ill|Tsurugaoka Inari Shrine Kofun|ja|鶴ヶ丘稲荷神社古墳|qq=draft}} - Located in '''Tsurugashima City, Saitama Prefecture'''. * {{ill|Inari-yama Park Kofun Cluster|ja|稲荷山公園古墳群|qq=draft}} - Located in '''Sayama City, Saitama Prefecture'''. * {{ill|Inaridai Kofun Group|ja|稲荷台古墳群|en|qq=draft}} - Located in '''Ichihara City, Chiba Prefecture'''. ** {{ill|Inaridai No.1 Kofun|ja|稲荷台1号墳|qq=draft}}''' (稲荷台1号墳)'''
* {{ill|Gion-Nagasuga Kofun Cluster|ja|祇園・長須賀古墳群|qq=draft}} - Located in '''Kisarazu City, Chiba Prefecture''', part of the '''Gion-Nagasuga Kofun Cluster'''. * {{ill|Inari-mae Kofun Cluster|ja|稲荷前古墳群|qq=draft}} - Located in '''Yokohama City, Kanagawa Prefecture'''. * {{ill|Motoinari Kofun|ja|元稲荷古墳|qq=draft}} - Located in '''Muko City, Kyoto Prefecture''', part of the '''Muko Hill Kofun Cluster'''.
== Related Articles == * {{ill|List of Kofun in Japan|ja|日本の古墳一覧|qq=draft}} * {{ill|List of Kofun in Japan with the Name "Hyō"|ja|「瓢」の付く日本列島の古墳一覧|qq=draft}}

* {{ill|Gion-Nagasuga Kofun Cluster|ja|祇園・長須賀古墳群|qq=draft}} - Located in '''Kisarazu City, Chiba Prefecture''', part of the '''Gion-Nagasuga Kofun Cluster'''. * {{ill|Inari-mae Kofun Cluster|ja|稲荷前古墳群|qq=draft}} - Located in '''Yokohama City, Kanagawa Prefecture'''. * {{ill|Motoinari Kofun|ja|元稲荷古墳|qq=draft}} - Located in '''Muko City, Kyoto Prefecture''', part of the '''Muko Hill Kofun Cluster'''.

revision.text:
'''List of Kofun in the Japanese Archipelago with the Name "Inari"''' (「稲荷」の付く日本列島の古墳一覧)
This article provides a list of '''kofun''' (ancient Kofuns) and '''kofun clusters''' in the '''Japanese Archipelago''' whose names include '''"Inari"''' (稲荷 / とうか / いなり).
== Overview == Throughout '''Japan''', there are many kofun with names such as '''"Inari-zuka"''' (稲荷塚) and '''"Inari-yama"''' (稲荷山). Additionally, there are variations such as '''"Inari-mori"''' (稲荷森), '''"Inari-mae"''' (稲荷前), and '''"Inari-dai"''' (稲荷台), creating diverse '''naming patterns'''.
== {{ill|Inariyama Kofun (disambiguation)|lt=Inariyama Kofun|ja|稲荷山古墳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Inariyama Kofun (disambiguation)|qq=}} == * {{ill|Shiraishi Inari-yama Kofun|ja|白石稲荷山古墳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shiraishi Inari-yama Kofun|qq=}} - Located in '''Fujioka City, Gunma Prefecture''', part of the '''Shiraishi Kofun Cluster'''. * {{ill|Inari-yama Kofun (Ōta City)|ja|稲荷山古墳 (太田市)|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Inari-yama Kofun (Ōta City)|qq=}} - Located in '''Ōta City, Gunma Prefecture'''. * {{ill|Kamikozuka Inari-yama Kofun|ja|上小塙稲荷山古墳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kamikozuka Inari-yama Kofun|qq=}} - Located in '''Takasaki City, Gunma Prefecture'''. * {{ill|Kazekaeshi Inari-yama Kofun|ja|風返稲荷山古墳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kazekaeshi Inari-yama Kofun|qq=}} - Located in '''Kasumigaura City, Ibaraki Prefecture'''. * {{ill|Inariyama Kofun|ja|稲荷山古墳 (行田市)|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Inariyama Kofun|qq=}} - Located in '''Gyōda City, Saitama Prefecture''', part of the '''Saitama Kofun Cluster'''. ** [[Inariyama Sword|Inariyama Kofun Iron Sword]]''' (稲荷山古墳出土鉄剣)'''
* {{ill|Inari-yama Kofun (Futtsu City)|ja|稲荷山古墳 (富津市)|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Inari-yama Kofun (Futtsu City)|qq=}} - Located in '''Futtsu City, Chiba Prefecture''', part of the '''Dairizuka Kofun Cluster'''. * {{ill|Inari-yama Kofun (Makinohara City)|ja|稲荷山古墳 (牧之原市)|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Inari-yama Kofun (Makinohara City)|qq=}} - Located in '''Makinohara City, Shizuoka Prefecture'''. * {{ill|Mikuriya Kofun Cluster|ja|御厨古墳群|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mikuriya Kofun Cluster|qq=}} - Located in '''Iwata City, Shizuoka Prefecture''', part of the '''Mikuriya Kofun Cluster'''. * {{ill|Mitsui Inari-yama Kofun|ja|三ツ井稲荷山古墳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mitsui Inari-yama Kofun|qq=}} - Located in '''Ichinomiya City, Aichi Prefecture'''. * {{ill|Kamo Inari-yama Kofun|ja|鴨稲荷山古墳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kamo Inari-yama Kofun|qq=}} - Located in '''Takashima City, Shiga Prefecture'''. * {{ill|Inari-yama Kofun (Tamba-Sasayama City)|ja|稲荷山古墳 (丹波篠山市)|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Inari-yama Kofun (Tamba-Sasayama City)|qq=}} - Located in '''Tamba-Sasayama City, Hyogo Prefecture'''.
== {{ill|Inari-zuka Kofun|ja|稲荷塚古墳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Inari-zuka Kofun|qq=}} == * {{ill|Inarizuka Kofun|ja|稲荷塚古墳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Inarizuka Kofun|qq=}} - A rare {{ill|Octagonal Kofun|ja|八角墳|1=Octagonal Kofun|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Octagonal Kofun|13=User:Immanuelle/Octagonal Kofun|qq=}} * {{ill|Inari-zuka Kofun Cluster|ja|稲荷塚古墳群|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Inari-zuka Kofun Cluster|qq=}} - Located in '''Kawajima Town, Hiki District, Saitama Prefecture'''. * {{ill|Inari-zuka Kofun (Ranzan Town)|ja|稲荷塚古墳 (嵐山町)|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Inari-zuka Kofun (Ranzan Town)|qq=}} - Located in '''Ranzan Town, Hiki District, Saitama Prefecture'''. * {{ill|Hikizugawa Kofun Cluster|ja|樋遣川古墳群|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hikizugawa Kofun Cluster|qq=}} - Located in '''Kazo City, Saitama Prefecture''', part of the '''Hikizugawa Kofun Cluster'''. * {{ill|Inari-zuka Kofun (Tama City)|ja|稲荷塚古墳 (多摩市)|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Inari-zuka Kofun (Tama City)|qq=}} - Located in '''Tama City, Tokyo Prefecture'''. * {{ill|Inari-zuka Kofun (Kōfu City)|ja|稲荷塚古墳 (甲府市)|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Inari-zuka Kofun (Kōfu City)|qq=}} - Located in '''Kōfu City, Yamanashi Prefecture'''. * {{ill|Inari-zuka Kofun (Habikino City)|ja|稲荷塚古墳 (羽曳野市)|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Inari-zuka Kofun (Habikino City)|qq=}} - Located in '''Habikino City, Osaka Prefecture''', part of the '''Furuichi Kofun Cluster'''. * {{ill|Inouchi Inari-zuka Kofun|ja|井ノ内稲荷塚古墳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Inouchi Inari-zuka Kofun|qq=}} - Located in '''Nagaokakyo City, Kyoto Prefecture'''.
== Other Kofun == * {{ill|Inari-mori Kofun|ja|稲荷森古墳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Inari-mori Kofun|qq=}} - Located in '''Nanyō City, Yamagata Prefecture'''. * {{ill|Inari Kofun Cluster|ja|稲荷古墳群|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Inari Kofun Cluster|qq=}} - Located in '''Utsunomiya City, Tochigi Prefecture'''. * {{ill|Tora Inari Kofun|ja|寅稲荷古墳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tora Inari Kofun|qq=}} - Located in '''Fukaya City, Saitama Prefecture''', part of the '''Shijūzuka Kofun Cluster'''. * {{ill|Ōtōka Kofun Cluster|ja|大稲荷古墳群|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōtōka Kofun Cluster|qq=}} - Located in '''Gyōda City, Saitama Prefecture'''. * {{ill|Sanpei Inari Shrine Kofun|ja|三変稲荷神社古墳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sanpei Inari Shrine Kofun|qq=}} - Located in '''Kawagoe City, Saitama Prefecture''', part of the '''Semba Kofun Cluster'''. * {{ill|Tsurugaoka Inari Shrine Kofun|ja|鶴ヶ丘稲荷神社古墳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsurugaoka Inari Shrine Kofun|qq=}} - Located in '''Tsurugashima City, Saitama Prefecture'''. * {{ill|Inari-yama Park Kofun Cluster|ja|稲荷山公園古墳群|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Inari-yama Park Kofun Cluster|qq=}} - Located in '''Sayama City, Saitama Prefecture'''. * {{ill|Inaridai Kofun Group|ja|稲荷台古墳群|en|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Inaridai Kofun Group|qq=}} - Located in '''Ichihara City, Chiba Prefecture'''. ** {{ill|Inaridai No.1 Kofun|ja|稲荷台1号墳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Inaridai No.1 Kofun|qq=}}''' (稲荷台1号墳)'''
* {{ill|Gion-Nagasuga Kofun Cluster|ja|祇園・長須賀古墳群|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gion-Nagasuga Kofun Cluster|qq=}} - Located in '''Kisarazu City, Chiba Prefecture''', part of the '''Gion-Nagasuga Kofun Cluster'''. * {{ill|Inari-mae Kofun Cluster|ja|稲荷前古墳群|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Inari-mae Kofun Cluster|qq=}} - Located in '''Yokohama City, Kanagawa Prefecture'''. * {{ill|Motoinari Kofun|ja|元稲荷古墳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Motoinari Kofun|qq=}} - Located in '''Muko City, Kyoto Prefecture''', part of the '''Muko Hill Kofun Cluster'''.

revision.text:
'''List of Kofun in the Japanese Archipelago with the Name "Inari"''' (「稲荷」の付く日本列島の古墳一覧)
This article provides a list of '''kofun''' (ancient Kofuns) and '''kofun clusters''' in the '''Japanese Archipelago''' whose names include '''"Inari"''' (稲荷 / とうか / いなり).
== Overview == Throughout '''Japan''', there are many kofun with names such as '''"Inari-zuka"''' (稲荷塚) and '''"Inari-yama"''' (稲荷山). Additionally, there are variations such as '''"Inari-mori"''' (稲荷森), '''"Inari-mae"''' (稲荷前), and '''"Inari-dai"''' (稲荷台), creating diverse '''naming patterns'''.
== {{ill|Inariyama Kofun (disambiguation)|lt=Inariyama Kofun|ja|稲荷山古墳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Inariyama Kofun (disambiguation)|qq=}} == * [[:en:Shiroishi Inariyama Kofun|Shiraishi Inari-yama Kofun]] - Located in '''Fujioka City, Gunma Prefecture''', part of the '''Shiraishi Kofun Cluster'''. * {{ill|Inari-yama Kofun (Ōta City)|ja|稲荷山古墳 (太田市)|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Inari-yama Kofun (Ōta City)|qq=}} - Located in '''Ōta City, Gunma Prefecture'''. * {{ill|Kamikozuka Inari-yama Kofun|ja|上小塙稲荷山古墳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kamikozuka Inari-yama Kofun|qq=}} - Located in '''Takasaki City, Gunma Prefecture'''. * {{ill|Kazekaeshi Inari-yama Kofun|ja|風返稲荷山古墳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kazekaeshi Inari-yama Kofun|qq=}} - Located in '''Kasumigaura City, Ibaraki Prefecture'''. * [[:en:Inariyama Kofun|Inariyama Kofun]] - Located in '''Gyōda City, Saitama Prefecture''', part of the '''Saitama Kofun Cluster'''. ** [[Inariyama Sword|Inariyama Kofun Iron Sword]]''' (稲荷山古墳出土鉄剣)'''
* {{ill|Inari-yama Kofun (Futtsu City)|ja|稲荷山古墳 (富津市)|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Inari-yama Kofun (Futtsu City)|qq=}} - Located in '''Futtsu City, Chiba Prefecture''', part of the '''Dairizuka Kofun Cluster'''. * {{ill|Inari-yama Kofun (Makinohara City)|ja|稲荷山古墳 (牧之原市)|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Inari-yama Kofun (Makinohara City)|qq=}} - Located in '''Makinohara City, Shizuoka Prefecture'''. * [[:en:Mikuriyama Kofun group|Mikuriya Kofun Cluster]] - Located in '''Iwata City, Shizuoka Prefecture''', part of the '''Mikuriya Kofun Cluster'''. * {{ill|Mitsui Inari-yama Kofun|ja|三ツ井稲荷山古墳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mitsui Inari-yama Kofun|qq=}} - Located in '''Ichinomiya City, Aichi Prefecture'''. * {{ill|Kamo Inari-yama Kofun|ja|鴨稲荷山古墳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kamo Inari-yama Kofun|qq=}} - Located in '''Takashima City, Shiga Prefecture'''. * {{ill|Inari-yama Kofun (Tamba-Sasayama City)|ja|稲荷山古墳 (丹波篠山市)|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Inari-yama Kofun (Tamba-Sasayama City)|qq=}} - Located in '''Tamba-Sasayama City, Hyōgo Prefecture'''.
== {{ill|Inari-zuka Kofun|ja|稲荷塚古墳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Inari-zuka Kofun|qq=}} == * {{ill|Inarizuka Kofun|ja|稲荷塚古墳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Inarizuka Kofun|qq=}} - A rare {{ill|Octagonal Kofun|ja|八角墳|1=Octagonal Kofun|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Octagonal Kofun|13=User:Immanuelle/Octagonal Kofun|qq=}} * {{ill|Inari-zuka Kofun Cluster|ja|稲荷塚古墳群|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Inari-zuka Kofun Cluster|qq=}} - Located in '''Kawajima Town, Hiki District, Saitama Prefecture'''. * {{ill|Inari-zuka Kofun (Ranzan Town)|ja|稲荷塚古墳 (嵐山町)|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Inari-zuka Kofun (Ranzan Town)|qq=}} - Located in '''Ranzan Town, Hiki District, Saitama Prefecture'''. * {{ill|Hikizugawa Kofun Cluster|ja|樋遣川古墳群|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hikizugawa Kofun Cluster|qq=}} - Located in '''Kazo City, Saitama Prefecture''', part of the '''Hikizugawa Kofun Cluster'''. * {{ill|Inari-zuka Kofun (Tama City)|ja|稲荷塚古墳 (多摩市)|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Inari-zuka Kofun (Tama City)|qq=}} - Located in '''Tama City, Tokyo Prefecture'''. * {{ill|Inari-zuka Kofun (Kōfu City)|ja|稲荷塚古墳 (甲府市)|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Inari-zuka Kofun (Kōfu City)|qq=}} - Located in '''Kōfu City, Yamanashi Prefecture'''. * {{ill|Inari-zuka Kofun (Habikino City)|ja|稲荷塚古墳 (羽曳野市)|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Inari-zuka Kofun (Habikino City)|qq=}} - Located in '''Habikino City, Osaka Prefecture''', part of the '''Furuichi Kofun Cluster'''. * {{ill|Inouchi Inari-zuka Kofun|ja|井ノ内稲荷塚古墳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Inouchi Inari-zuka Kofun|qq=}} - Located in '''Nagaokakyo City, Kyoto Prefecture'''.
== Other Kofun == * [[:en:Inarimori Kofun|Inari-mori Kofun]] - Located in '''Nanyō City, Yamagata Prefecture'''. * {{ill|Inari Kofun Cluster|ja|稲荷古墳群|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Inari Kofun Cluster|qq=}} - Located in '''Utsunomiya City, Tochigi Prefecture'''. * {{ill|Tora Inari Kofun|ja|寅稲荷古墳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tora Inari Kofun|qq=}} - Located in '''Fukaya City, Saitama Prefecture''', part of the '''Shijūzuka Kofun Cluster'''. * {{ill|Ōtōka Kofun Cluster|ja|大稲荷古墳群|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōtōka Kofun Cluster|qq=}} - Located in '''Gyōda City, Saitama Prefecture'''. * {{ill|Sanpei Inari Shrine Kofun|ja|三変稲荷神社古墳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sanpei Inari Shrine Kofun|qq=}} - Located in '''Kawagoe City, Saitama Prefecture''', part of the '''Semba Kofun Cluster'''. * {{ill|Tsurugaoka Inari Shrine Kofun|ja|鶴ヶ丘稲荷神社古墳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsurugaoka Inari Shrine Kofun|qq=}} - Located in '''Tsurugashima City, Saitama Prefecture'''. * {{ill|Inari-yama Park Kofun Cluster|ja|稲荷山公園古墳群|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Inari-yama Park Kofun Cluster|qq=}} - Located in '''Sayama City, Saitama Prefecture'''. * [[:en:Inaridai Kofun Group|Inaridai Kofun Group]] - Located in '''Ichihara City, Chiba Prefecture'''. ** {{ill|Inaridai No.1 Kofun|ja|稲荷台1号墳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Inaridai No.1 Kofun|qq=}}''' (稲荷台1号墳)'''
* {{ill|Gion-Nagasuga Kofun Cluster|ja|祇園・長須賀古墳群|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gion-Nagasuga Kofun Cluster|qq=}} - Located in '''Kisarazu City, Chiba Prefecture''', part of the '''Gion-Nagasuga Kofun Cluster'''. * {{ill|Inari-mae Kofun Cluster|ja|稲荷前古墳群|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Inari-mae Kofun Cluster|qq=}} - Located in '''Yokohama City, Kanagawa Prefecture'''. * {{ill|Motoinari Kofun|ja|元稲荷古墳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Motoinari Kofun|qq=}} - Located in '''Muko City, Kyoto Prefecture''', part of the '''Muko Hill Kofun Cluster'''.

== {{ill|Inari-zuka Kofun|ja|稲荷塚古墳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Inari-zuka Kofun|qq=}} == * {{ill|Inarizuka Kofun|ja|稲荷塚古墳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Inarizuka Kofun|qq=}} - A rare {{ill|Octagonal Kofun|ja|八角墳|1=Octagonal Kofun|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Octagonal Kofun|13=User:Immanuelle/Octagonal Kofun|qq=}} * {{ill|Inari-zuka Kofun Cluster|ja|稲荷塚古墳群|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Inari-zuka Kofun Cluster|qq=}} - Located in '''Kawajima Town, Hiki District, Saitama Prefecture'''. * {{ill|Inari-zuka Kofun (Ranzan Town)|ja|稲荷塚古墳 (嵐山町)|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Inari-zuka Kofun (Ranzan Town)|qq=}} - Located in '''Ranzan Town, Hiki District, Saitama Prefecture'''. * {{ill|Hikizugawa Kofun Cluster|ja|樋遣川古墳群|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hikizugawa Kofun Cluster|qq=}} - Located in '''Kazo City, Saitama Prefecture''', part of the '''Hikizugawa Kofun Cluster'''. * {{ill|Inari-zuka Kofun (Tama City)|ja|稲荷塚古墳 (多摩市)|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Inari-zuka Kofun (Tama City)|qq=}} - Located in '''Tama City, Tokyo Prefecture'''. * {{ill|Inari-zuka Kofun (Kōfu City)|ja|稲荷塚古墳 (甲府市)|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Inari-zuka Kofun (Kōfu City)|qq=}} - Located in '''Kōfu City, Yamanashi Prefecture'''. * {{ill|Inari-zuka Kofun (Habikino City)|ja|稲荷塚古墳 (羽曳野市)|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Inari-zuka Kofun (Habikino City)|qq=}} - Located in '''Habikino City, Osaka Prefecture''', part of the '''Furuichi Kofun Cluster'''. * {{ill|Inouchi Inari-zuka Kofun|ja|井ノ内稲荷塚古墳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Inouchi Inari-zuka Kofun|qq=}} - Located in '''Nagaokakyo City, Kyoto Prefecture'''.
== Other Kofun == * [[:en:Inarimori Kofun|Inari-mori Kofun]] - Located in '''Nanyō City, Yamagata Prefecture'''. * {{ill|Inari Kofun Cluster|ja|稲荷古墳群|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Inari Kofun Cluster|qq=}} - Located in '''Utsunomiya City, Tochigi Prefecture'''. * {{ill|Tora Inari Kofun|ja|寅稲荷古墳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tora Inari Kofun|qq=}} - Located in '''Fukaya City, Saitama Prefecture''', part of the '''Shijūzuka Kofun Cluster'''. * {{ill|Ōtōka Kofun Cluster|ja|大稲荷古墳群|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōtōka Kofun Cluster|qq=}} - Located in '''Gyōda City, Saitama Prefecture'''. * {{ill|Sanpei Inari Shrine Kofun|ja|三変稲荷神社古墳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sanpei Inari Shrine Kofun|qq=}} - Located in '''Kawagoe City, Saitama Prefecture''', part of the '''Semba Kofun Cluster'''. * {{ill|Tsurugaoka Inari Shrine Kofun|ja|鶴ヶ丘稲荷神社古墳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsurugaoka Inari Shrine Kofun|qq=}} - Located in '''Tsurugashima City, Saitama Prefecture'''. * {{ill|Inari-yama Park Kofun Cluster|ja|稲荷山公園古墳群|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Inari-yama Park Kofun Cluster|qq=}} - Located in '''Sayama City, Saitama Prefecture'''. * [[:en:Inaridai Kofun Group|Inaridai Kofun Group]] - Located in '''Ichihara City, Chiba Prefecture'''. ** {{ill|Inaridai No.1 Kofun|ja|稲荷台1号墳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Inaridai No.1 Kofun|qq=}}''' (稲荷台1号墳)'''

revision.text:
'''List of Kofun in the Japanese Archipelago with the Name "Inari"''' (「稲荷」の付く日本列島の古墳一覧)
This article provides a list of '''kofun''' (ancient Kofuns) and '''kofun clusters''' in the '''Japanese Archipelago''' whose names include '''"Inari"''' (稲荷 / とうか / いなり).
== Overview == Throughout '''Japan''', there are many kofun with names such as '''"Inari-zuka"''' (稲荷塚) and '''"Inari-yama"''' (稲荷山). Additionally, there are variations such as '''"Inari-mori"''' (稲荷森), '''"Inari-mae"''' (稲荷前), and '''"Inari-dai"''' (稲荷台), creating diverse '''naming patterns'''.
== {{ill|Inariyama Kofun (disambiguation)|lt=Inariyama Kofun|ja|稲荷山古墳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Inariyama Kofun (disambiguation)|qq=}} == * [[:en:Shiroishi Inariyama Kofun|Shiraishi Inari-yama Kofun]] - Located in '''Fujioka City, Gunma Prefecture''', part of the '''Shiraishi Kofun Cluster'''. * {{ill|Inari-yama Kofun (Ōta City)|ja|稲荷山古墳 (太田市)|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Inari-yama Kofun (Ōta City)|qq=}} - Located in '''Ōta City, Gunma Prefecture'''. * {{ill|Kamikozuka Inari-yama Kofun|ja|上小塙稲荷山古墳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kamikozuka Inari-yama Kofun|qq=}} - Located in '''Takasaki City, Gunma Prefecture'''. * {{ill|Kazekaeshi Inari-yama Kofun|ja|風返稲荷山古墳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kazekaeshi Inari-yama Kofun|qq=}} - Located in '''Kasumigaura City, Ibaraki Prefecture'''. * [[:en:Inariyama Kofun|Inariyama Kofun]] - Located in '''Gyōda City, Saitama Prefecture''', part of the '''Saitama Kofun Cluster'''. ** [[Inariyama Sword|Inariyama Kofun Iron Sword]]''' (稲荷山古墳出土鉄剣)'''
* {{ill|Inari-yama Kofun (Futtsu City)|ja|稲荷山古墳 (富津市)|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Inari-yama Kofun (Futtsu City)|qq=}} - Located in '''Futtsu City, Chiba Prefecture''', part of the '''Dairizuka Kofun Cluster'''. * {{ill|Inari-yama Kofun (Makinohara City)|ja|稲荷山古墳 (牧之原市)|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Inari-yama Kofun (Makinohara City)|qq=}} - Located in '''Makinohara City, Shizuoka Prefecture'''. * [[:en:Mikuriyama Kofun group|Mikuriya Kofun Cluster]] - Located in '''Iwata City, Shizuoka Prefecture''', part of the '''Mikuriya Kofun Cluster'''. * {{ill|Mitsui Inari-yama Kofun|ja|三ツ井稲荷山古墳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mitsui Inari-yama Kofun|qq=}} - Located in '''Ichinomiya City, Aichi Prefecture'''. * {{ill|Kamo Inari-yama Kofun|ja|鴨稲荷山古墳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kamo Inari-yama Kofun|qq=}} - Located in '''Takashima City, Shiga Prefecture'''. * {{ill|Inari-yama Kofun (Tamba-Sasayama City)|ja|稲荷山古墳 (丹波篠山市)|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Inari-yama Kofun (Tamba-Sasayama City)|qq=}} - Located in '''Tamba-Sasayama City, Hyōgo Prefecture'''.
== {{ill|Inari-zuka Kofun|ja|稲荷塚古墳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Inari-zuka Kofun|qq=}} == * {{ill|Inarizuka Kofun|ja|稲荷塚古墳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Inarizuka Kofun|qq=}} - A rare {{ill|Octagonal Kofun|ja|八角墳|1=Octagonal Kofun|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Octagonal Kofun|13=User:Immanuelle/Octagonal Kofun|qq=}} * {{ill|Inari-zuka Kofun Cluster|ja|稲荷塚古墳群|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Inari-zuka Kofun Cluster|qq=}} - Located in '''Kawajima Town, Hiki District, Saitama Prefecture'''. * {{ill|Inari-zuka Kofun (Ranzan Town)|ja|稲荷塚古墳 (嵐山町)|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Inari-zuka Kofun (Ranzan Town)|qq=}} - Located in '''Ranzan Town, Hiki District, Saitama Prefecture'''. * {{ill|Hikizugawa Kofun Cluster|ja|樋遣川古墳群|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hikizugawa Kofun Cluster|qq=}} - Located in '''Kazo City, Saitama Prefecture''', part of the '''Hikizugawa Kofun Cluster'''. * {{ill|Inari-zuka Kofun (Tama City)|ja|稲荷塚古墳 (多摩市)|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Inari-zuka Kofun (Tama City)|qq=}} - Located in '''Tama City, Tokyo Prefecture'''. * {{ill|Inari-zuka Kofun (Kōfu City)|ja|稲荷塚古墳 (甲府市)|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Inari-zuka Kofun (Kōfu City)|qq=}} - Located in '''Kōfu City, Yamanashi Prefecture'''. * {{ill|Inari-zuka Kofun (Habikino City)|ja|稲荷塚古墳 (羽曳野市)|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Inari-zuka Kofun (Habikino City)|qq=}} - Located in '''Habikino City, Osaka Prefecture''', part of the '''Furuichi Kofun Cluster'''. * {{ill|Inouchi Inari-zuka Kofun|ja|井ノ内稲荷塚古墳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Inouchi Inari-zuka Kofun|qq=}} - Located in '''Nagaokakyo City, Kyoto Prefecture'''.
== Other Kofun == * [[:en:Inarimori Kofun|Inari-mori Kofun]] - Located in '''Nanyō City, Yamagata Prefecture'''. * {{ill|Inari Kofun Cluster|ja|稲荷古墳群|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Inari Kofun Cluster|qq=}} - Located in '''Utsunomiya City, Tochigi Prefecture'''. * {{ill|Tora Inari Kofun|ja|寅稲荷古墳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tora Inari Kofun|qq=}} - Located in '''Fukaya City, Saitama Prefecture''', part of the '''Shijūzuka Kofun Cluster'''. * {{ill|Ōtōka Kofun Cluster|ja|大稲荷古墳群|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōtōka Kofun Cluster|qq=}} - Located in '''Gyōda City, Saitama Prefecture'''. * {{ill|Sanpei Inari Shrine Kofun|ja|三変稲荷神社古墳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sanpei Inari Shrine Kofun|qq=}} - Located in '''Kawagoe City, Saitama Prefecture''', part of the '''Semba Kofun Cluster'''. * {{ill|Tsurugaoka Inari Shrine Kofun|ja|鶴ヶ丘稲荷神社古墳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsurugaoka Inari Shrine Kofun|qq=}} - Located in '''Tsurugashima City, Saitama Prefecture'''. * {{ill|Inari-yama Park Kofun Cluster|ja|稲荷山公園古墳群|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Inari-yama Park Kofun Cluster|qq=}} - Located in '''Sayama City, Saitama Prefecture'''. * [[:en:Inaridai Kofun Group|Inaridai Kofun Group]] - Located in '''Ichihara City, Chiba Prefecture'''. ** {{ill|Inaridai No.1 Kofun|ja|稲荷台1号墳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Inaridai No.1 Kofun|qq=}}''' (稲荷台1号墳)'''
* {{ill|Gion-Nagasuga Kofun Cluster|ja|祇園・長須賀古墳群|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gion-Nagasuga Kofun Cluster|qq=}} - Located in '''Kisarazu City, Chiba Prefecture''', part of the '''Gion-Nagasuga Kofun Cluster'''. * {{ill|Inari-mae Kofun Cluster|ja|稲荷前古墳群|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Inari-mae Kofun Cluster|qq=}} - Located in '''Yokohama City, Kanagawa Prefecture'''. * {{ill|Motoinari Kofun|ja|元稲荷古墳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Motoinari Kofun|qq=}} - Located in '''Muko City, Kyoto Prefecture''', part of the '''Muko Hill Kofun Cluster'''.
== Related Articles == * {{ill|List of Kofun in Japan|ja|日本の古墳一覧|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/List of Kofun in Japan|qq=}} * {{ill|List of Kofun in Japan with the Name "Hyō"|ja|「瓢」の付く日本列島の古墳一覧|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/List of Kofun in Japan with the Name "Hyō"|qq=}}

'''List of Kofun in the Japanese Archipelago with the Name "Inari"''' (「稲荷」の付く日本列島の古墳一覧)
This article provides a list of '''kofun''' (ancient Kofuns) and '''kofun clusters''' in the '''Japanese Archipelago''' whose names include '''"Inari"''' (稲荷 / とうか / いなり).
== Overview == Throughout '''Japan''', there are many kofun with names such as '''"Inari-zuka"''' (稲荷塚) and '''"Inari-yama"''' (稲荷山). Additionally, there are variations such as '''"Inari-mori"''' (稲荷森), '''"Inari-mae"''' (稲荷前), and '''"Inari-dai"''' (稲荷台), creating diverse '''naming patterns'''.

* {{ill|Inari-yama Kofun (Futtsu City)|ja|稲荷山古墳 (富津市)|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Inari-yama Kofun (Futtsu City)|qq=}} - Located in '''Futtsu City, Chiba Prefecture''', part of the '''Dairizuka Kofun Cluster'''. * {{ill|Inari-yama Kofun (Makinohara City)|ja|稲荷山古墳 (牧之原市)|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Inari-yama Kofun (Makinohara City)|qq=}} - Located in '''Makinohara City, Shizuoka Prefecture'''. * [[:en:Mikuriyama Kofun group|Mikuriya Kofun Cluster]] - Located in '''Iwata City, Shizuoka Prefecture''', part of the '''Mikuriya Kofun Cluster'''. * {{ill|Mitsui Inari-yama Kofun|ja|三ツ井稲荷山古墳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mitsui Inari-yama Kofun|qq=}} - Located in '''Ichinomiya City, Aichi Prefecture'''. * {{ill|Kamo Inari-yama Kofun|ja|鴨稲荷山古墳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kamo Inari-yama Kofun|qq=}} - Located in '''Takashima City, Shiga Prefecture'''. * {{ill|Inari-yama Kofun (Tamba-Sasayama City)|ja|稲荷山古墳 (丹波篠山市)|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Inari-yama Kofun (Tamba-Sasayama City)|qq=}} - Located in '''Tamba-Sasayama City, Hyōgo Prefecture'''.

'''List of Kofun in the Japanese Archipelago with the Name "Inari"''' (「稲荷」の付く日本列島の古墳一覧)
This article provides a list of '''kofun''' (ancient Kofuns) and '''kofun clusters''' in the '''Japanese Archipelago''' whose names include '''"Inari"''' (稲荷 / とうか / いなり).
== Overview == Throughout '''Japan''', there are many kofun with names such as '''"Inari-zuka"''' (稲荷塚) and '''"Inari-yama"''' (稲荷山). Additionally, there are variations such as '''"Inari-mori"''' (稲荷森), '''"Inari-mae"''' (稲荷前), and '''"Inari-dai"''' (稲荷台), creating diverse '''naming patterns'''.
== {{ill|Inariyama Kofun (disambiguation)|lt=Inariyama Kofun|ja|稲荷山古墳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Inariyama Kofun (disambiguation)|qq=}} == * [[:en:Shiroishi Inariyama Kofun|Shiraishi Inari-yama Kofun]] - Located in '''Fujioka City, Gunma Prefecture''', part of the '''Shiraishi Kofun Cluster'''. * {{ill|Inari-yama Kofun (Ōta City)|ja|稲荷山古墳 (太田市)|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Inari-yama Kofun (Ōta City)|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 群馬県立太田高等学校}} - Located in '''Ōta City, Gunma Prefecture'''. * {{ill|Kamikozuka Inari-yama Kofun|ja|上小塙稲荷山古墳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kamikozuka Inari-yama Kofun|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Located in '''Takasaki City, Gunma Prefecture'''. * {{ill|Kazekaeshi Inari-yama Kofun|ja|風返稲荷山古墳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kazekaeshi Inari-yama Kofun|qq=}} - Located in '''Kasumigaura City, Ibaraki Prefecture'''. * [[:en:Inariyama Kofun|Inariyama Kofun]] - Located in '''Gyōda City, Saitama Prefecture''', part of the '''Saitama Kofun Cluster'''. ** [[Inariyama Sword|Inariyama Kofun Iron Sword]]''' (稲荷山古墳出土鉄剣)'''
* {{ill|Inari-yama Kofun (Futtsu City)|ja|稲荷山古墳 (富津市)|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Inari-yama Kofun (Futtsu City)|qq=}} - Located in '''Futtsu City, Chiba Prefecture''', part of the '''Dairizuka Kofun Cluster'''. * {{ill|Inari-yama Kofun (Makinohara City)|ja|稲荷山古墳 (牧之原市)|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Inari-yama Kofun (Makinohara City)|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Located in '''Makinohara City, Shizuoka Prefecture'''. * [[:en:Mikuriyama Kofun group|Mikuriya Kofun Cluster]] - Located in '''Iwata City, Shizuoka Prefecture''', part of the '''Mikuriya Kofun Cluster'''. * {{ill|Mitsui Inari-yama Kofun|ja|三ツ井稲荷山古墳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mitsui Inari-yama Kofun|qq=}} - Located in '''Ichinomiya City, Aichi Prefecture'''. * {{ill|Kamo Inari-yama Kofun|ja|鴨稲荷山古墳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kamo Inari-yama Kofun|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 稲荷山古墳 (高島市)}} - Located in '''Takashima City, Shiga Prefecture'''. * {{ill|Inari-yama Kofun (Tamba-Sasayama City)|ja|稲荷山古墳 (丹波篠山市)|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Inari-yama Kofun (Tamba-Sasayama City)|qq=}} - Located in '''Tamba-Sasayama City, Hyōgo Prefecture'''.

== Other Kofun == * [[:en:Inarimori Kofun|Inari-mori Kofun]] - Located in '''Nanyō City, Yamagata Prefecture'''. * {{ill|Inari Kofun Cluster|ja|稲荷古墳群|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Inari Kofun Cluster|qq=}} - Located in '''Utsunomiya City, Tochigi Prefecture'''. * {{ill|Tora Inari Kofun|ja|寅稲荷古墳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tora Inari Kofun|qq=}} - Located in '''Fukaya City, Saitama Prefecture''', part of the '''Shijūzuka Kofun Cluster'''. * {{ill|Ōtōka Kofun Cluster|ja|大稲荷古墳群|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōtōka Kofun Cluster|qq=}} - Located in '''Gyōda City, Saitama Prefecture'''. * {{ill|Sanpei Inari Shrine Kofun|ja|三変稲荷神社古墳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sanpei Inari Shrine Kofun|qq=}} - Located in '''Kawagoe City, Saitama Prefecture''', part of the '''Semba Kofun Cluster'''. * {{ill|Tsurugaoka Inari Shrine Kofun|ja|鶴ヶ丘稲荷神社古墳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsurugaoka Inari Shrine Kofun|qq=}} - Located in '''Tsurugashima City, Saitama Prefecture'''. * {{ill|Inari-yama Park Kofun Cluster|ja|稲荷山公園古墳群|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Inari-yama Park Kofun Cluster|qq=}} - Located in '''Sayama City, Saitama Prefecture'''. * [[:en:Inaridai Kofun Group|Inaridai Kofun Group]] - Located in '''Ichihara City, Chiba Prefecture'''. ** {{ill|Inaridai No.1 Kofun|ja|稲荷台1号墳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Inaridai No.1 Kofun|qq=|comment=enwiki is a redirect}}''' (稲荷台1号墳)'''

revision.text:
'''List of Kofun in the Japanese Archipelago with the Name "Inari"''' (「稲荷」の付く日本列島の古墳一覧)
This article provides a list of '''kofun''' (ancient Kofuns) and '''kofun clusters''' in the '''Japanese Archipelago''' whose names include '''"Inari"''' (稲荷 / とうか / いなり).
== Overview == Throughout '''Japan''', there are many kofun with names such as '''"Inari-zuka"''' (稲荷塚) and '''"Inari-yama"''' (稲荷山). Additionally, there are variations such as '''"Inari-mori"''' (稲荷森), '''"Inari-mae"''' (稲荷前), and '''"Inari-dai"''' (稲荷台), creating diverse '''naming patterns'''.
== {{ill|Inariyama Kofun (disambiguation)|lt=Inariyama Kofun|ja|稲荷山古墳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Inariyama Kofun (disambiguation)|qq=}} == * [[:en:Shiroishi Inariyama Kofun|Shiraishi Inari-yama Kofun]] - Located in '''Fujioka City, Gunma Prefecture''', part of the '''Shiraishi Kofun Cluster'''. * {{ill|Inari-yama Kofun (Ōta City)|ja|稲荷山古墳 (太田市)|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Inari-yama Kofun (Ōta City)|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 群馬県立太田高等学校}} - Located in '''Ōta City, Gunma Prefecture'''. * {{ill|Kamikozuka Inari-yama Kofun|ja|上小塙稲荷山古墳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kamikozuka Inari-yama Kofun|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Located in '''Takasaki City, Gunma Prefecture'''. * {{ill|Kazekaeshi Inari-yama Kofun|ja|風返稲荷山古墳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kazekaeshi Inari-yama Kofun|qq=}} - Located in '''Kasumigaura City, Ibaraki Prefecture'''. * [[:en:Inariyama Kofun|Inariyama Kofun]] - Located in '''Gyōda City, Saitama Prefecture''', part of the '''Saitama Kofun Cluster'''. ** [[Inariyama Sword|Inariyama Kofun Iron Sword]]''' (稲荷山古墳出土鉄剣)'''
* {{ill|Inari-yama Kofun (Futtsu City)|ja|稲荷山古墳 (富津市)|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Inari-yama Kofun (Futtsu City)|qq=}} - Located in '''Futtsu City, Chiba Prefecture''', part of the '''Dairizuka Kofun Cluster'''. * {{ill|Inari-yama Kofun (Makinohara City)|ja|稲荷山古墳 (牧之原市)|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Inari-yama Kofun (Makinohara City)|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Located in '''Makinohara City, Shizuoka Prefecture'''. * [[:en:Mikuriyama Kofun group|Mikuriya Kofun Cluster]] - Located in '''Iwata City, Shizuoka Prefecture''', part of the '''Mikuriya Kofun Cluster'''. * {{ill|Mitsui Inari-yama Kofun|ja|三ツ井稲荷山古墳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mitsui Inari-yama Kofun|qq=}} - Located in '''Ichinomiya City, Aichi Prefecture'''. * {{ill|Kamo Inari-yama Kofun|ja|鴨稲荷山古墳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kamo Inari-yama Kofun|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 稲荷山古墳 (高島市)}} - Located in '''Takashima City, Shiga Prefecture'''. * {{ill|Inari-yama Kofun (Tamba-Sasayama City)|ja|稲荷山古墳 (丹波篠山市)|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Inari-yama Kofun (Tamba-Sasayama City)|qq=}} - Located in '''Tamba-Sasayama City, Hyōgo Prefecture'''.
== {{ill|Inari-zuka Kofun|ja|稲荷塚古墳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Inari-zuka Kofun|qq=}} == * {{ill|Inarizuka Kofun|ja|稲荷塚古墳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Inarizuka Kofun|qq=}} - A rare {{ill|Octagonal Kofun|ja|八角墳|1=Octagonal Kofun|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Octagonal Kofun|13=User:Immanuelle/Octagonal Kofun|qq=|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} * {{ill|Inari-zuka Kofun Cluster|ja|稲荷塚古墳群|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Inari-zuka Kofun Cluster|qq=}} - Located in '''Kawajima Town, Hiki District, Saitama Prefecture'''. * {{ill|Inari-zuka Kofun (Ranzan Town)|ja|稲荷塚古墳 (嵐山町)|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Inari-zuka Kofun (Ranzan Town)|qq=}} - Located in '''Ranzan Town, Hiki District, Saitama Prefecture'''. * {{ill|Hikizugawa Kofun Cluster|ja|樋遣川古墳群|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hikizugawa Kofun Cluster|qq=}} - Located in '''Kazo City, Saitama Prefecture''', part of the '''Hikizugawa Kofun Cluster'''. * {{ill|Inari-zuka Kofun (Tama City)|ja|稲荷塚古墳 (多摩市)|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Inari-zuka Kofun (Tama City)|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Located in '''Tama City, Tokyo Prefecture'''. * {{ill|Inari-zuka Kofun (Kōfu City)|ja|稲荷塚古墳 (甲府市)|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Inari-zuka Kofun (Kōfu City)|qq=}} - Located in '''Kōfu City, Yamanashi Prefecture'''. * {{ill|Inari-zuka Kofun (Habikino City)|ja|稲荷塚古墳 (羽曳野市)|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Inari-zuka Kofun (Habikino City)|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Located in '''Habikino City, Osaka Prefecture''', part of the '''Furuichi Kofun Cluster'''. * {{ill|Inouchi Inari-zuka Kofun|ja|井ノ内稲荷塚古墳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Inouchi Inari-zuka Kofun|qq=}} - Located in '''Nagaokakyo City, Kyoto Prefecture'''.
== Other Kofun == * [[:en:Inarimori Kofun|Inari-mori Kofun]] - Located in '''Nanyō City, Yamagata Prefecture'''. * {{ill|Inari Kofun Cluster|ja|稲荷古墳群|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Inari Kofun Cluster|qq=}} - Located in '''Utsunomiya City, Tochigi Prefecture'''. * {{ill|Tora Inari Kofun|ja|寅稲荷古墳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tora Inari Kofun|qq=}} - Located in '''Fukaya City, Saitama Prefecture''', part of the '''Shijūzuka Kofun Cluster'''. * {{ill|Ōtōka Kofun Cluster|ja|大稲荷古墳群|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōtōka Kofun Cluster|qq=}} - Located in '''Gyōda City, Saitama Prefecture'''. * {{ill|Sanpei Inari Shrine Kofun|ja|三変稲荷神社古墳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sanpei Inari Shrine Kofun|qq=}} - Located in '''Kawagoe City, Saitama Prefecture''', part of the '''Semba Kofun Cluster'''. * {{ill|Tsurugaoka Inari Shrine Kofun|ja|鶴ヶ丘稲荷神社古墳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsurugaoka Inari Shrine Kofun|qq=}} - Located in '''Tsurugashima City, Saitama Prefecture'''. * {{ill|Inari-yama Park Kofun Cluster|ja|稲荷山公園古墳群|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Inari-yama Park Kofun Cluster|qq=}} - Located in '''Sayama City, Saitama Prefecture'''. * [[:en:Inaridai Kofun Group|Inaridai Kofun Group]] - Located in '''Ichihara City, Chiba Prefecture'''. ** {{ill|Inaridai No.1 Kofun|ja|稲荷台1号墳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Inaridai No.1 Kofun|qq=|comment=enwiki is a redirect}}''' (稲荷台1号墳)'''
* {{ill|Gion-Nagasuga Kofun Cluster|ja|祇園・長須賀古墳群|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gion-Nagasuga Kofun Cluster|qq=}} - Located in '''Kisarazu City, Chiba Prefecture''', part of the '''Gion-Nagasuga Kofun Cluster'''. * {{ill|Inari-mae Kofun Cluster|ja|稲荷前古墳群|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Inari-mae Kofun Cluster|qq=}} - Located in '''Yokohama City, Kanagawa Prefecture'''. * {{ill|Motoinari Kofun|ja|元稲荷古墳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Motoinari Kofun|qq=}} - Located in '''Muko City, Kyoto Prefecture''', part of the '''Muko Hill Kofun Cluster'''.
