{{afc comment|Wikidata entry (none) Wikidata name: (none) [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 07:51, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} '''List of Kofun in the Japanese Archipelago with the Name "Inari"''' (「稲荷」の付く日本列島の古墳一覧)
This article provides a list of '''kofun''' (ancient Kofuns) and '''kofun clusters''' in the '''Japanese Archipelago''' whose names include '''"Inari"''' (稲荷 / とうか / いなり).
== Overview == Throughout '''Japan''', there are many kofun with names such as '''"Inari-zuka"''' (稲荷塚) and '''"Inari-yama"''' (稲荷山). Additionally, there are variations such as '''"Inari-mori"''' (稲荷森), '''"Inari-mae"''' (稲荷前), and '''"Inari-dai"''' (稲荷台), creating diverse '''naming patterns'''.
== {{ill|Inariyama Kofun (disambiguation)|lt=Inariyama Kofun|ja|稲荷山古墳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Inariyama Kofun (disambiguation)|qq=}} == * [[:en:Shiroishi Inariyama Kofun|Shiraishi Inari-yama Kofun]] - Located in '''Fujioka City, Gunma Prefecture''', part of the '''Shiraishi Kofun Cluster'''. * {{ill|Inari-yama Kofun (Ōta City)|ja|稲荷山古墳 (太田市)|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Inari-yama Kofun (Ōta City)|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 群馬県立太田高等学校}} - Located in '''Ōta City, Gunma Prefecture'''. * {{ill|Kamikozuka Inari-yama Kofun|ja|上小塙稲荷山古墳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kamikozuka Inari-yama Kofun|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Located in '''Takasaki City, Gunma Prefecture'''. * {{ill|Kazekaeshi Inari-yama Kofun|ja|風返稲荷山古墳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kazekaeshi Inari-yama Kofun|qq=}} - Located in '''Kasumigaura City, Ibaraki Prefecture'''. * [[:en:Inariyama Kofun|Inariyama Kofun]] - Located in '''Gyōda City, Saitama Prefecture''', part of the '''Saitama Kofun Cluster'''. ** [[:en:Inariyama Sword|Inariyama Kofun Iron Sword]]''' (稲荷山古墳出土鉄剣)'''
* {{ill|Inari-yama Kofun (Futtsu City)|ja|稲荷山古墳 (富津市)|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Inari-yama Kofun (Futtsu City)|qq=}} - Located in '''Futtsu City, Chiba Prefecture''', part of the '''Dairizuka Kofun Cluster'''. * {{ill|Inari-yama Kofun (Makinohara City)|ja|稲荷山古墳 (牧之原市)|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Inari-yama Kofun (Makinohara City)|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Located in '''Makinohara City, Shizuoka Prefecture'''. * [[:en:Mikuriyama Kofun group|Mikuriya Kofun Cluster]] - Located in '''Iwata City, Shizuoka Prefecture''', part of the '''Mikuriya Kofun Cluster'''. * {{ill|Mitsui Inari-yama Kofun|ja|三ツ井稲荷山古墳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mitsui Inari-yama Kofun|qq=}} - Located in '''Ichinomiya City, Aichi Prefecture'''. * {{ill|Kamo Inari-yama Kofun|ja|鴨稲荷山古墳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kamo Inari-yama Kofun|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 稲荷山古墳 (高島市)}} - Located in '''Takashima City, Shiga Prefecture'''. * {{ill|Inari-yama Kofun (Tamba-Sasayama City)|ja|稲荷山古墳 (丹波篠山市)|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Inari-yama Kofun (Tamba-Sasayama City)|qq=}} - Located in '''Tamba-Sasayama City, Hyōgo Prefecture'''.
== {{ill|Inari-zuka Kofun|ja|稲荷塚古墳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Inari-zuka Kofun|qq=}} == * {{ill|Inarizuka Kofun|ja|稲荷塚古墳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Inarizuka Kofun|qq=}} - A rare {{ill|Octagonal Kofun|ja|八角墳|1=Octagonal Kofun|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Octagonal Kofun|13=User:Immanuelle/Octagonal Kofun|qq=|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} * {{ill|Inari-zuka Kofun Cluster|ja|稲荷塚古墳群|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Inari-zuka Kofun Cluster|qq=}} - Located in '''Kawajima Town, Hiki District, Saitama Prefecture'''. * {{ill|Inari-zuka Kofun (Ranzan Town)|ja|稲荷塚古墳 (嵐山町)|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Inari-zuka Kofun (Ranzan Town)|qq=}} - Located in '''Ranzan Town, Hiki District, Saitama Prefecture'''. * {{ill|Hikizugawa Kofun Cluster|ja|樋遣川古墳群|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hikizugawa Kofun Cluster|qq=}} - Located in '''Kazo City, Saitama Prefecture''', part of the '''Hikizugawa Kofun Cluster'''. * {{ill|Inari-zuka Kofun (Tama City)|ja|稲荷塚古墳 (多摩市)|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Inari-zuka Kofun (Tama City)|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Located in '''Tama City, Tokyo Prefecture'''. * {{ill|Inari-zuka Kofun (Kōfu City)|ja|稲荷塚古墳 (甲府市)|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Inari-zuka Kofun (Kōfu City)|qq=}} - Located in '''Kōfu City, Yamanashi Prefecture'''. * {{ill|Inari-zuka Kofun (Habikino City)|ja|稲荷塚古墳 (羽曳野市)|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Inari-zuka Kofun (Habikino City)|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Located in '''Habikino City, Osaka Prefecture''', part of the '''Furuichi Kofun Cluster'''. * {{ill|Inouchi Inari-zuka Kofun|ja|井ノ内稲荷塚古墳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Inouchi Inari-zuka Kofun|qq=}} - Located in '''Nagaokakyo City, Kyoto Prefecture'''.
== Other Kofun == * [[:en:Inarimori Kofun|Inari-mori Kofun]] - Located in '''Nanyō City, Yamagata Prefecture'''. * {{ill|Inari Kofun Cluster|ja|稲荷古墳群|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Inari Kofun Cluster|qq=}} - Located in '''Utsunomiya City, Tochigi Prefecture'''. * {{ill|Tora Inari Kofun|ja|寅稲荷古墳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tora Inari Kofun|qq=}} - Located in '''Fukaya City, Saitama Prefecture''', part of the '''Shijūzuka Kofun Cluster'''. * {{ill|Ōtōka Kofun Cluster|ja|大稲荷古墳群|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōtōka Kofun Cluster|qq=}} - Located in '''Gyōda City, Saitama Prefecture'''. * {{ill|Sanpei Inari Shrine Kofun|ja|三変稲荷神社古墳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sanpei Inari Shrine Kofun|qq=}} - Located in '''Kawagoe City, Saitama Prefecture''', part of the '''Semba Kofun Cluster'''. * {{ill|Tsurugaoka Inari Shrine Kofun|ja|鶴ヶ丘稲荷神社古墳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsurugaoka Inari Shrine Kofun|qq=}} - Located in '''Tsurugashima City, Saitama Prefecture'''. * {{ill|Inari-yama Park Kofun Cluster|ja|稲荷山公園古墳群|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Inari-yama Park Kofun Cluster|qq=}} - Located in '''Sayama City, Saitama Prefecture'''. * [[:en:Inaridai Kofun Group|Inaridai Kofun Group]] - Located in '''Ichihara City, Chiba Prefecture'''. ** {{ill|Inaridai No.1 Kofun|ja|稲荷台1号墳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Inaridai No.1 Kofun|qq=|comment=enwiki is a redirect}}''' (稲荷台1号墳)'''
* {{ill|Gion-Nagasuga Kofun Cluster|ja|祇園・長須賀古墳群|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gion-Nagasuga Kofun Cluster|qq=}} - Located in '''Kisarazu City, Chiba Prefecture''', part of the '''Gion-Nagasuga Kofun Cluster'''. * {{ill|Inari-mae Kofun Cluster|ja|稲荷前古墳群|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Inari-mae Kofun Cluster|qq=}} - Located in '''Yokohama City, Kanagawa Prefecture'''. * {{ill|Motoinari Kofun|ja|元稲荷古墳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Motoinari Kofun|qq=}} - Located in '''Muko City, Kyoto Prefecture''', part of the '''Muko Hill Kofun Cluster'''.

* {{ill|Inari-yama Kofun (Futtsu City)|ja|稲荷山古墳 (富津市)|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Inari-yama Kofun (Futtsu City)|qq=}} - Located in '''Futtsu City, Chiba Prefecture''', part of the '''Dairizuka Kofun Cluster'''. * {{ill|Inari-yama Kofun (Makinohara City)|ja|稲荷山古墳 (牧之原市)|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Inari-yama Kofun (Makinohara City)|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Located in '''Makinohara City, Shizuoka Prefecture'''. * [[:en:Mikuriyama Kofun group|Mikuriya Kofun Cluster]] - Located in '''Iwata City, Shizuoka Prefecture''', part of the '''Mikuriya Kofun Cluster'''. * {{ill|Mitsui Inari-yama Kofun|ja|三ツ井稲荷山古墳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mitsui Inari-yama Kofun|qq=}} - Located in '''Ichinomiya City, Aichi Prefecture'''. * {{ill|Kamo Inari-yama Kofun|ja|鴨稲荷山古墳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kamo Inari-yama Kofun|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 稲荷山古墳 (高島市)}} - Located in '''Takashima City, Shiga Prefecture'''. * {{ill|Inari-yama Kofun (Tamba-Sasayama City)|ja|稲荷山古墳 (丹波篠山市)|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Inari-yama Kofun (Tamba-Sasayama City)|qq=}} - Located in '''Tamba-Sasayama City, Hyōgo Prefecture'''.

{{afc comment|Wikidata entry (none) Wikidata name: (none) [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 07:51, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} '''List of Kofun in the Japanese Archipelago with the Name "Inari"''' (「稲荷」の付く日本列島の古墳一覧)
This article provides a list of '''kofun''' (ancient Kofuns) and '''kofun clusters''' in the '''Japanese Archipelago''' whose names include '''"Inari"''' (稲荷 / とうか / いなり).
== Overview == Throughout '''Japan''', there are many kofun with names such as '''"Inari-zuka"''' (稲荷塚) and '''"Inari-yama"''' (稲荷山). Additionally, there are variations such as '''"Inari-mori"''' (稲荷森), '''"Inari-mae"''' (稲荷前), and '''"Inari-dai"''' (稲荷台), creating diverse '''naming patterns'''.

* {{ill|Inari-yama Kofun (Futtsu City)|ja|稲荷山古墳 (富津市)|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Inari-yama Kofun (Futtsu City)|qq=}} - Located in '''Futtsu City, Chiba Prefecture''', part of the '''Dairizuka Kofun Cluster'''. * {{ill|Inari-yama Kofun (Makinohara City)|ja|稲荷山古墳 (牧之原市)|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Inari-yama Kofun (Makinohara City)|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Located in '''Makinohara City, Shizuoka Prefecture'''. * [[:en:Mikuriyama Kofun group|Mikuriya Kofun Cluster]] - Located in '''Iwata City, Shizuoka Prefecture''', part of the '''Mikuriya Kofun Cluster'''. * {{ill|Mitsui Inari-yama Kofun|ja|三ツ井稲荷山古墳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mitsui Inari-yama Kofun|qq=}} - Located in '''Ichinomiya City, Aichi Prefecture'''. * {{ill|Kamo Inari-yama Kofun|ja|鴨稲荷山古墳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kamo Inari-yama Kofun|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 稲荷山古墳 (高島市)}} - Located in '''Takashima City, Shiga Prefecture'''. * {{ill|Inari-yama Kofun (Tamba-Sasayama City)|ja|稲荷山古墳 (丹波篠山市)|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Inari-yama Kofun (Tamba-Sasayama City)|qq=}} - Located in '''Tamba-Sasayama City, Hyōgo Prefecture'''.

This article provides a list of '''kofun''' (ancient Kofuns) and '''kofun clusters''' in the '''Japanese Archipelago''' whose names include '''"Inari"''' (稲荷 / とうか / いなり).
== Overview == Throughout '''Japan''', there are many kofun with names such as '''"Inari-zuka"''' (稲荷塚) and '''"Inari-yama"''' (稲荷山). Additionally, there are variations such as '''"Inari-mori"''' (稲荷森), '''"Inari-mae"''' (稲荷前), and '''"Inari-dai"''' (稲荷台), creating diverse '''naming patterns'''.

* {{ill|Inari-yama Kofun (Futtsu City)|ja|稲荷山古墳 (富津市)|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Inari-yama Kofun (Futtsu City)|qq=}} - Located in '''Futtsu City, Chiba Prefecture''', part of the '''Dairizuka Kofun Cluster'''. * {{ill|Inari-yama Kofun (Makinohara City)|ja|稲荷山古墳 (牧之原市)|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Inari-yama Kofun (Makinohara City)|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Located in '''Makinohara City, Shizuoka Prefecture'''. * [[:en:Mikuriyama Kofun group|Mikuriya Kofun Cluster]] - Located in '''Iwata City, Shizuoka Prefecture''', part of the '''Mikuriya Kofun Cluster'''. * {{ill|Mitsui Inari-yama Kofun|ja|三ツ井稲荷山古墳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mitsui Inari-yama Kofun|qq=}} - Located in '''Ichinomiya City, Aichi Prefecture'''. * {{ill|Kamo Inari-yama Kofun|ja|鴨稲荷山古墳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kamo Inari-yama Kofun|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 稲荷山古墳 (高島市)}} - Located in '''Takashima City, Shiga Prefecture'''. * {{ill|Inari-yama Kofun (Tamba-Sasayama City)|ja|稲荷山古墳 (丹波篠山市)|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Inari-yama Kofun (Tamba-Sasayama City)|qq=}} - Located in '''Tamba-Sasayama City, Hyōgo Prefecture'''.

* {{ill|Inari-yama Kofun (Futtsu City)|ja|稲荷山古墳 (富津市)|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Inari-yama Kofun (Futtsu City)|qq=}} - Located in '''Futtsu City, Chiba Prefecture''', part of the '''Dairizuka Kofun Cluster'''. * {{ill|Inari-yama Kofun (Makinohara City)|ja|稲荷山古墳 (牧之原市)|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Inari-yama Kofun (Makinohara City)|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Located in '''Makinohara City, Shizuoka Prefecture'''. * [[:en:Mikuriyama Kofun group|Mikuriya Kofun Cluster]] - Located in '''Iwata City, Shizuoka Prefecture''', part of the '''Mikuriya Kofun Cluster'''. * {{ill|Mitsui Inari-yama Kofun|ja|三ツ井稲荷山古墳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mitsui Inari-yama Kofun|qq=}} - Located in '''Ichinomiya City, Aichi Prefecture'''. * {{ill|Kamo Inari-yama Kofun|ja|鴨稲荷山古墳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kamo Inari-yama Kofun|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 稲荷山古墳 (高島市)}} - Located in '''Takashima City, Shiga Prefecture'''. * {{ill|Inari-yama Kofun (Tamba-Sasayama City)|ja|稲荷山古墳 (丹波篠山市)|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Inari-yama Kofun (Tamba-Sasayama City)|qq=}} - Located in '''Tamba-Sasayama City, Hyōgo Prefecture'''.
== {{ill|Inari-zuka Kofun|ja|稲荷塚古墳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Inari-zuka Kofun|qq=}} == * {{ill|Inarizuka Kofun|ja|稲荷塚古墳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Inarizuka Kofun|qq=}} - A rare {{ill|Octagonal Kofun|ja|八角墳|1=Octagonal Kofun|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Octagonal Kofun|13=User:Immanuelle/Octagonal Kofun|qq=|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} * {{ill|Inari-zuka Kofun Cluster|ja|稲荷塚古墳群|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Inari-zuka Kofun Cluster|qq=}} - Located in '''Kawajima Town, Hiki District, Saitama Prefecture'''. * {{ill|Inari-zuka Kofun (Ranzan Town)|ja|稲荷塚古墳 (嵐山町)|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Inari-zuka Kofun (Ranzan Town)|qq=}} - Located in '''Ranzan Town, Hiki District, Saitama Prefecture'''. * {{ill|Hikizugawa Kofun Cluster|ja|樋遣川古墳群|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hikizugawa Kofun Cluster|qq=}} - Located in '''Kazo City, Saitama Prefecture''', part of the '''Hikizugawa Kofun Cluster'''. * {{ill|Inari-zuka Kofun (Tama City)|ja|稲荷塚古墳 (多摩市)|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Inari-zuka Kofun (Tama City)|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Located in '''Tama City, Tokyo Prefecture'''. * {{ill|Inari-zuka Kofun (Kōfu City)|ja|稲荷塚古墳 (甲府市)|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Inari-zuka Kofun (Kōfu City)|qq=}} - Located in '''Kōfu City, Yamanashi Prefecture'''. * {{ill|Inari-zuka Kofun (Habikino City)|ja|稲荷塚古墳 (羽曳野市)|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Inari-zuka Kofun (Habikino City)|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Located in '''Habikino City, Osaka Prefecture''', part of the '''Furuichi Kofun Cluster'''. * {{ill|Inouchi Inari-zuka Kofun|ja|井ノ内稲荷塚古墳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Inouchi Inari-zuka Kofun|qq=}} - Located in '''Nagaokakyo City, Kyoto Prefecture'''.
== Other Kofun == * [[:en:Inarimori Kofun|Inari-mori Kofun]] - Located in '''Nanyō City, Yamagata Prefecture'''. * {{ill|Inari Kofun Cluster|ja|稲荷古墳群|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Inari Kofun Cluster|qq=}} - Located in '''Utsunomiya City, Tochigi Prefecture'''. * {{ill|Tora Inari Kofun|ja|寅稲荷古墳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tora Inari Kofun|qq=}} - Located in '''Fukaya City, Saitama Prefecture''', part of the '''Shijūzuka Kofun Cluster'''. * {{ill|Ōtōka Kofun Cluster|ja|大稲荷古墳群|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōtōka Kofun Cluster|qq=}} - Located in '''Gyōda City, Saitama Prefecture'''. * {{ill|Sanpei Inari Shrine Kofun|ja|三変稲荷神社古墳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sanpei Inari Shrine Kofun|qq=}} - Located in '''Kawagoe City, Saitama Prefecture''', part of the '''Semba Kofun Cluster'''. * {{ill|Tsurugaoka Inari Shrine Kofun|ja|鶴ヶ丘稲荷神社古墳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsurugaoka Inari Shrine Kofun|qq=}} - Located in '''Tsurugashima City, Saitama Prefecture'''. * {{ill|Inari-yama Park Kofun Cluster|ja|稲荷山公園古墳群|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Inari-yama Park Kofun Cluster|qq=}} - Located in '''Sayama City, Saitama Prefecture'''. * [[:en:Inaridai Kofun Group|Inaridai Kofun Group]] - Located in '''Ichihara City, Chiba Prefecture'''. ** {{ill|Inaridai No.1 Kofun|ja|稲荷台1号墳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Inaridai No.1 Kofun|qq=|comment=enwiki is a redirect}}''' (稲荷台1号墳)'''
* {{ill|Gion-Nagasuga Kofun Cluster|ja|祇園・長須賀古墳群|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gion-Nagasuga Kofun Cluster|qq=}} - Located in '''Kisarazu City, Chiba Prefecture''', part of the '''Gion-Nagasuga Kofun Cluster'''. * {{ill|Inari-mae Kofun Cluster|ja|稲荷前古墳群|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Inari-mae Kofun Cluster|qq=}} - Located in '''Yokohama City, Kanagawa Prefecture'''. * {{ill|Motoinari Kofun|ja|元稲荷古墳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Motoinari Kofun|qq=}} - Located in '''Muko City, Kyoto Prefecture''', part of the '''Muko Hill Kofun Cluster'''.

This article provides a list of '''kofun''' (ancient Kofuns) and '''kofun clusters''' in the '''Japanese Archipelago''' whose names include '''"Inari"''' (稲荷 / とうか / いなり).
== Overview == Throughout '''Japan''', there are many kofun with names such as '''"Inari-zuka"''' (稲荷塚) and '''"Inari-yama"''' (稲荷山). Additionally, there are variations such as '''"Inari-mori"''' (稲荷森), '''"Inari-mae"''' (稲荷前), and '''"Inari-dai"''' (稲荷台), creating diverse '''naming patterns'''.

This article provides a list of '''kofun''' (ancient Kofuns) and '''kofun clusters''' in the '''Japanese Archipelago''' whose names include '''"Inari"''' (稲荷 / とうか / いなり).
== Overview == Throughout '''Japan''', there are many kofun with names such as '''"Inari-zuka"''' (稲荷塚) and '''"Inari-yama"''' (稲荷山). Additionally, there are variations such as '''"Inari-mori"''' (稲荷森), '''"Inari-mae"''' (稲荷前), and '''"Inari-dai"''' (稲荷台), creating diverse '''naming patterns'''.

{{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q123992447]] Wikidata name: (none) [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 05:21, 12 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|Wikidata entry (none) Wikidata name: (none) [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 07:51, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} '''List of Kofun in the Japanese Archipelago with the Name "Inari"''' (「稲荷」の付く日本列島の古墳一覧)
This article provides a list of '''kofun''' (ancient Kofuns) and '''kofun clusters''' in the '''Japanese Archipelago''' whose names include '''"Inari"''' (稲荷 / とうか / いなり).
== Overview == Throughout '''Japan''', there are many kofun with names such as '''"Inari-zuka"''' (稲荷塚) and '''"Inari-yama"''' (稲荷山). Additionally, there are variations such as '''"Inari-mori"''' (稲荷森), '''"Inari-mae"''' (稲荷前), and '''"Inari-dai"''' (稲荷台), creating diverse '''naming patterns'''.
== {{ill|Inariyama Kofun (disambiguation)|lt=Inariyama Kofun|ja|稲荷山古墳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Inariyama Kofun (disambiguation)|qq=}} == * [[:en:Shiroishi Inariyama Kofun|Shiraishi Inari-yama Kofun]] - Located in '''Fujioka City, Gunma Prefecture''', part of the '''Shiraishi Kofun Cluster'''. * {{ill|Inari-yama Kofun (Ōta City)|ja|稲荷山古墳 (太田市)|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Inari-yama Kofun (Ōta City)|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 群馬県立太田高等学校|1=Inari-yama Kofun (Ōta City)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11609647}} - Located in '''Ōta City, Gunma Prefecture'''. * {{ill|Kamikozuka Inari-yama Kofun|ja|上小塙稲荷山古墳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kamikozuka Inari-yama Kofun|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Located in '''Takasaki City, Gunma Prefecture'''. * {{ill|Kazekaeshi Inari-yama Kofun|ja|風返稲荷山古墳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kazekaeshi Inari-yama Kofun|qq=|1=Kazekaeshi Inari-yama Kofun|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q117090199}} - Located in '''Kasumigaura City, Ibaraki Prefecture'''. * [[:en:Inariyama Kofun|Inariyama Kofun]] - Located in '''Gyōda City, Saitama Prefecture''', part of the '''Saitama Kofun Cluster'''. ** [[:en:Inariyama Sword|Inariyama Kofun Iron Sword]]''' (稲荷山古墳出土鉄剣)'''

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:「稲荷」の付く日本列島の古墳一覧]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q123992447]] Wikidata name: (none) [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 05:21, 12 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|Wikidata entry (none) Wikidata name: (none) [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 07:51, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} '''List of Kofun in the Japanese Archipelago with the Name "Inari"''' (「稲荷」の付く日本列島の古墳一覧)
This article provides a list of '''kofun''' (ancient Kofuns) and '''kofun clusters''' in the '''Japanese Archipelago''' whose names include '''"Inari"''' (稲荷 / とうか / いなり).
== Overview == Throughout '''Japan''', there are many kofun with names such as '''"Inari-zuka"''' (稲荷塚) and '''"Inari-yama"''' (稲荷山). Additionally, there are variations such as '''"Inari-mori"''' (稲荷森), '''"Inari-mae"''' (稲荷前), and '''"Inari-dai"''' (稲荷台), creating diverse '''naming patterns'''.
== {{ill|Inariyama Kofun (disambiguation)|lt=Inariyama Kofun|ja|稲荷山古墳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Inariyama Kofun (disambiguation)|qq=}} == * [[:en:Shiroishi Inariyama Kofun|Shiraishi Inari-yama Kofun]] - Located in '''Fujioka City, Gunma Prefecture''', part of the '''Shiraishi Kofun Cluster'''. * {{ill|Inari-yama Kofun (Ōta City)|ja|稲荷山古墳 (太田市)|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Inari-yama Kofun (Ōta City)|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 群馬県立太田高等学校|1=Inari-yama Kofun (Ōta City)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11609647}} - Located in '''Ōta City, Gunma Prefecture'''. * {{ill|Kamikozuka Inari-yama Kofun|ja|上小塙稲荷山古墳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kamikozuka Inari-yama Kofun|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Located in '''Takasaki City, Gunma Prefecture'''. * {{ill|Kazekaeshi Inari-yama Kofun|ja|風返稲荷山古墳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kazekaeshi Inari-yama Kofun|qq=|1=Kazekaeshi Inari-yama Kofun|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q117090199}} - Located in '''Kasumigaura City, Ibaraki Prefecture'''. * [[:en:Inariyama Kofun|Inariyama Kofun]] - Located in '''Gyōda City, Saitama Prefecture''', part of the '''Saitama Kofun Cluster'''. ** [[:en:Inariyama Sword|Inariyama Kofun Iron Sword]]''' (稲荷山古墳出土鉄剣)'''
* {{ill|Inari-yama Kofun (Futtsu City)|ja|稲荷山古墳 (富津市)|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Inari-yama Kofun (Futtsu City)|qq=|1=Inari-yama Kofun (Futtsu City)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11596865}} - Located in '''Futtsu City, Chiba Prefecture''', part of the '''Dairizuka Kofun Cluster'''. * {{ill|Inari-yama Kofun (Makinohara City)|ja|稲荷山古墳 (牧之原市)|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Inari-yama Kofun (Makinohara City)|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Located in '''Makinohara City, Shizuoka Prefecture'''. * [[:en:Mikuriyama Kofun group|Mikuriya Kofun Cluster]] - Located in '''Iwata City, Shizuoka Prefecture''', part of the '''Mikuriya Kofun Cluster'''. * {{ill|Mitsui Inari-yama Kofun|ja|三ツ井稲荷山古墳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mitsui Inari-yama Kofun|qq=|1=Mitsui Inariyama kofun|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11353998}} - Located in '''Ichinomiya City, Aichi Prefecture'''. * {{ill|Kamo Inari-yama Kofun|ja|鴨稲荷山古墳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kamo Inari-yama Kofun|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 稲荷山古墳 (高島市)|1=Inariyama Kofun|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q17193420}} - Located in '''Takashima City, Shiga Prefecture'''. * {{ill|Inari-yama Kofun (Tanba-Sasayama City)|ja|稲荷山古墳 (丹波篠山市)|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Inari-yama Kofun (Tanba-Sasayama City)|qq=|1=Inariyama Kofun (Tanbasasayama)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q78908788}} - Located in '''Tanba-Sasayama City, Hyōgo Prefecture'''.
== {{ill|Inari-zuka Kofun|ja|稲荷塚古墳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Inari-zuka Kofun|qq=|1=Inarizuka Kofun|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11596855}} == * {{ill|Inarizuka Kofun|ja|稲荷塚古墳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Inarizuka Kofun|qq=}} - Located in '''Kawajima Town, Hiki District, Saitama Prefecture'''. * {{ill|Inari-zuka Kofun (Ranzan Town)|ja|稲荷塚古墳 (嵐山町)|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Inari-zuka Kofun (Ranzan Town)|qq=|1=Inari-zuka Kofun (Ranzan Town)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q17193416}} - Located in '''Ranzan Town, Hiki District, Saitama Prefecture'''. * {{ill|Hikizugawa Kofun Cluster|ja|樋遣川古墳群|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hikizugawa Kofun Cluster|qq=|1=Hikizugawa Kofun Cluster|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11542198}} - Located in '''Kazo City, Saitama Prefecture''', part of the '''Hikizugawa Kofun Cluster'''. * {{ill|Inari-zuka Kofun (Tama City)|ja|稲荷塚古墳 (多摩市)|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Inari-zuka Kofun (Tama City)|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Located in '''Tama City, Tokyo Prefecture'''. * {{ill|Inari-zuka Kofun (Kōfu City)|ja|稲荷塚古墳 (甲府市)|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Inari-zuka Kofun (Kōfu City)|qq=|1=Inari-zuka Kofun (Kōfu City)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11596856}} - Located in '''Kōfu City, Yamanashi Prefecture'''. * {{ill|Inari-zuka Kofun (Habikino City)|ja|稲荷塚古墳 (羽曳野市)|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Inari-zuka Kofun (Habikino City)|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Located in '''Habikino City, Osaka Prefecture''', part of the '''Furuichi Kofun Cluster'''. * {{ill|Inouchi Inari-zuka Kofun|ja|井ノ内稲荷塚古墳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Inouchi Inari-zuka Kofun|qq=|1=Inouchi Inarizuka Kofun|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q116257052}} - Located in '''Nagaokakyo City, Kyoto Prefecture'''.
== Other Kofun == * [[:en:Inarimori Kofun|Inari-mori Kofun]] - Located in '''Nanyō City, Yamagata Prefecture'''. * {{ill|Inari Kofun Cluster|ja|稲荷古墳群|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Inari Kofun Cluster|qq=|1=Inari Kofun Cluster|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q109361208}} - Located in '''Utsunomiya City, Tochigi Prefecture'''. * {{ill|Tora Inari Kofun|ja|寅稲荷古墳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tora Inari Kofun|qq=|1=Tora Inari Kofun|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q17229373}} - Located in '''Fukaya City, Saitama Prefecture''', part of the '''Shijūzuka Kofun Cluster'''. * {{ill|Ōtōka Kofun Cluster|ja|大稲荷古墳群|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōtōka Kofun Cluster|qq=|1=Ōtōka Kofun Cluster|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q17222769}} - Located in '''Gyōda City, Saitama Prefecture'''. * {{ill|Sanpei Inari Shrine Kofun|ja|三変稲荷神社古墳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sanpei Inari Shrine Kofun|qq=|1=Sanpen Inari-jinja Kofun|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q17228685}} - Located in '''Kawagoe City, Saitama Prefecture''', part of the '''Semba Kofun Cluster'''. * {{ill|Tsurugaoka Inari Shrine Kofun|ja|鶴ヶ丘稲荷神社古墳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsurugaoka Inari Shrine Kofun|qq=}} - Located in '''Tsurugashima City, Saitama Prefecture'''. * {{ill|Inari-yama Park Kofun Cluster|ja|稲荷山公園古墳群|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Inari-yama Park Kofun Cluster|qq=|1=Inariyama Kōen Kofun Cluster|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11596863}} - Located in '''Sayama City, Saitama Prefecture'''. * [[:en:Inaridai Kofun Group|Inaridai Kofun Group]] - Located in '''Ichihara City, Chiba Prefecture'''. ** {{ill|Inaridai No.1 Kofun|ja|稲荷台1号墳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Inaridai No.1 Kofun|qq=|comment=enwiki is a redirect}}''' (稲荷台1号墳)'''

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:「稲荷」の付く日本列島の古墳一覧]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q123992447]] Wikidata name: (none) [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 05:21, 12 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|Wikidata entry (none) Wikidata name: (none) [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 07:51, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} '''List of Kofun in the Japanese Archipelago with the Name "Inari"''' (「稲荷」の付く日本列島の古墳一覧)
This article provides a list of '''kofun''' (ancient Kofuns) and '''kofun clusters''' in the '''Japanese Archipelago''' whose names include '''"Inari"''' (稲荷 / とうか / いなり).
== Overview == Throughout '''Japan''', there are many kofun with names such as '''"Inari-zuka"''' (稲荷塚) and '''"Inari-yama"''' (稲荷山). Additionally, there are variations such as '''"Inari-mori"''' (稲荷森), '''"Inari-mae"''' (稲荷前), and '''"Inari-dai"''' (稲荷台), creating diverse '''naming patterns'''.
== {{ill|Inariyama Kofun (disambiguation)|lt=Inariyama Kofun|ja|稲荷山古墳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Inariyama Kofun (disambiguation)|qq=}} == * [[:en:Shiroishi Inariyama Kofun|Shiraishi Inari-yama Kofun]] - Located in '''Fujioka City, Gunma Prefecture''', part of the '''Shiraishi Kofun Cluster'''. * {{ill|Inari-yama Kofun (Ōta City)|ja|稲荷山古墳 (太田市)|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Inari-yama Kofun (Ōta City)|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 群馬県立太田高等学校|1=Inari-yama Kofun (Ōta City)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11609647}} - Located in '''Ōta City, Gunma Prefecture'''. * {{ill|Kamikozuka Inari-yama Kofun|ja|上小塙稲荷山古墳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kamikozuka Inari-yama Kofun|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Located in '''Takasaki City, Gunma Prefecture'''. * {{ill|Kazekaeshi Inari-yama Kofun|ja|風返稲荷山古墳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kazekaeshi Inari-yama Kofun|1=Kazekaeshi Inari-yama Kofun|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q117090199}} - Located in '''Kasumigaura City, Ibaraki Prefecture'''. * [[:en:Inariyama Kofun|Inariyama Kofun]] - Located in '''Gyōda City, Saitama Prefecture''', part of the '''Saitama Kofun Cluster'''. ** [[:en:Inariyama Sword|Inariyama Kofun Iron Sword]]''' (稲荷山古墳出土鉄剣)'''
* {{ill|Inari-yama Kofun (Futtsu City)|ja|稲荷山古墳 (富津市)|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Inari-yama Kofun (Futtsu City)|1=Inari-yama Kofun (Futtsu City)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11596865}} - Located in '''Futtsu City, Chiba Prefecture''', part of the '''Dairizuka Kofun Cluster'''. * {{ill|Inari-yama Kofun (Makinohara City)|ja|稲荷山古墳 (牧之原市)|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Inari-yama Kofun (Makinohara City)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Located in '''Makinohara City, Shizuoka Prefecture'''. * [[:en:Mikuriyama Kofun group|Mikuriya Kofun Cluster]] - Located in '''Iwata City, Shizuoka Prefecture''', part of the '''Mikuriya Kofun Cluster'''. * {{ill|Mitsui Inari-yama Kofun|ja|三ツ井稲荷山古墳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mitsui Inari-yama Kofun|1=Mitsui Inariyama kofun|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11353998}} - Located in '''Ichinomiya City, Aichi Prefecture'''. * {{ill|Kamo Inari-yama Kofun|ja|鴨稲荷山古墳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kamo Inari-yama Kofun|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 稲荷山古墳 (高島市)|1=Inariyama Kofun|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q17193420}} - Located in '''Takashima City, Shiga Prefecture'''. * {{ill|Inari-yama Kofun (Tanba-Sasayama City)|ja|稲荷山古墳 (丹波篠山市)|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Inari-yama Kofun (Tanba-Sasayama City)|1=Inariyama Kofun (Tanbasasayama)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q78908788}} - Located in '''Tanba-Sasayama City, Hyōgo Prefecture'''.

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:「稲荷」の付く日本列島の古墳一覧]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q123992447]] Wikidata name: (none) [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 05:21, 12 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|Wikidata entry (none) Wikidata name: (none) [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 07:51, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} '''List of Kofun in the Japanese Archipelago with the Name "Inari"''' (「稲荷」の付く日本列島の古墳一覧)
This article provides a list of '''kofun''' (ancient Kofuns) and '''kofun clusters''' in the '''Japanese Archipelago''' whose names include '''"Inari"''' (稲荷 / とうか / いなり).
== Overview == Throughout '''Japan''', there are many kofun with names such as '''"Inari-zuka"''' (稲荷塚) and '''"Inari-yama"''' (稲荷山). Additionally, there are variations such as '''"Inari-mori"''' (稲荷森), '''"Inari-mae"''' (稲荷前), and '''"Inari-dai"''' (稲荷台), creating diverse '''naming patterns'''.
== {{ill|Inariyama Kofun (disambiguation)|lt=Inariyama Kofun|ja|稲荷山古墳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Inariyama Kofun (disambiguation)|qq=}} == * [[:en:Shiroishi Inariyama Kofun|Shiraishi Inari-yama Kofun]] - Located in '''Fujioka City, Gunma Prefecture''', part of the '''Shiraishi Kofun Cluster'''. * {{ill|Inari-yama Kofun (Ōta City)|ja|稲荷山古墳 (太田市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Inari-yama Kofun (Ōta City)|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 群馬県立太田高等学校|1=Inari-yama Kofun (Ōta City)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11609647}} - Located in '''Ōta City, Gunma Prefecture'''. * {{ill|Kamikozuka Inari-yama Kofun|ja|上小塙稲荷山古墳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kamikozuka Inari-yama Kofun|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Located in '''Takasaki City, Gunma Prefecture'''. * {{ill|Kazekaeshi Inari-yama Kofun|ja|風返稲荷山古墳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kazekaeshi Inari-yama Kofun|1=Kazekaeshi Inari-yama Kofun|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q117090199}} - Located in '''Kasumigaura City, Ibaraki Prefecture'''. * [[:en:Inariyama Kofun|Inariyama Kofun]] - Located in '''Gyōda City, Saitama Prefecture''', part of the '''Saitama Kofun Cluster'''. ** [[:en:Inariyama Sword|Inariyama Kofun Iron Sword]]''' (稲荷山古墳出土鉄剣)'''
* {{ill|Inari-yama Kofun (Futtsu City)|ja|稲荷山古墳 (富津市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Inari-yama Kofun (Futtsu City)|1=Inari-yama Kofun (Futtsu City)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11596865}} - Located in '''Futtsu City, Chiba Prefecture''', part of the '''Dairizuka Kofun Cluster'''. * {{ill|Inari-yama Kofun (Makinohara City)|ja|稲荷山古墳 (牧之原市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Inari-yama Kofun (Makinohara City)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Located in '''Makinohara City, Shizuoka Prefecture'''. * [[:en:Mikuriyama Kofun group|Mikuriya Kofun Cluster]] - Located in '''Iwata City, Shizuoka Prefecture''', part of the '''Mikuriya Kofun Cluster'''. * {{ill|Mitsui Inari-yama Kofun|ja|三ツ井稲荷山古墳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mitsui Inari-yama Kofun|1=Mitsui Inariyama kofun|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11353998}} - Located in '''Ichinomiya City, Aichi Prefecture'''. * {{ill|Kamo Inari-yama Kofun|ja|鴨稲荷山古墳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kamo Inari-yama Kofun|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 稲荷山古墳 (高島市)|1=Inariyama Kofun|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q17193420}} - Located in '''Takashima City, Shiga Prefecture'''. * {{ill|Inari-yama Kofun (Tanba-Sasayama City)|ja|稲荷山古墳 (丹波篠山市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Inari-yama Kofun (Tanba-Sasayama City)|1=Inariyama Kofun (Tanbasasayama)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q78908788}} - Located in '''Tanba-Sasayama City, Hyōgo Prefecture'''.
== {{ill|Inari-zuka Kofun|ja|稲荷塚古墳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Inari-zuka Kofun|1=Inarizuka Kofun|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11596855}} == * {{ill|Inarizuka Kofun|ja|稲荷塚古墳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Inarizuka Kofun|qq=}} - A rare {{ill|Octagonal Kofun|ja|八角墳|1=Octagonal Kofun|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Octagonal Kofun|13=User:Immanuelle/Octagonal Kofun|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} * {{ill|Inari-zuka Kofun Cluster|ja|稲荷塚古墳群|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Inari-zuka Kofun Cluster|1=Inari-zuka Kofun Cluster|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q17193418}} - Located in '''Ranzan Town, Hiki District, Saitama Prefecture'''. * {{ill|Hikizugawa Kofun Cluster|ja|樋遣川古墳群|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hikizugawa Kofun Cluster|1=Hikizugawa Kofun Cluster|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11542198}} - Located in '''Kazo City, Saitama Prefecture''', part of the '''Hikizugawa Kofun Cluster'''. * {{ill|Inari-zuka Kofun (Tama City)|ja|稲荷塚古墳 (多摩市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Inari-zuka Kofun (Tama City)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Located in '''Tama City, Tokyo Prefecture'''. * {{ill|Inari-zuka Kofun (Kōfu City)|ja|稲荷塚古墳 (甲府市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Inari-zuka Kofun (Kōfu City)|1=Inari-zuka Kofun (Kōfu City)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11596856}} - Located in '''Kōfu City, Yamanashi Prefecture'''. * {{ill|Inari-zuka Kofun (Habikino City)|ja|稲荷塚古墳 (羽曳野市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Inari-zuka Kofun (Habikino City)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Located in '''Habikino City, Osaka Prefecture''', part of the '''Furuichi Kofun Cluster'''. * {{ill|Inouchi Inari-zuka Kofun|ja|井ノ内稲荷塚古墳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Inouchi Inari-zuka Kofun|1=Inouchi Inarizuka Kofun|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q116257052}} - Located in '''Nagaokakyo City, Kyoto Prefecture'''.
== Other Kofun == * [[:en:Inarimori Kofun|Inari-mori Kofun]] - Located in '''Nanyō City, Yamagata Prefecture'''. * {{ill|Inari Kofun Cluster|ja|稲荷古墳群|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Inari Kofun Cluster|1=Inari Kofun Cluster|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q109361208}} - Located in '''Utsunomiya City, Tochigi Prefecture'''. * {{ill|Tora Inari Kofun|ja|寅稲荷古墳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tora Inari Kofun|1=Tora Inari Kofun|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q17229373}} - Located in '''Fukaya City, Saitama Prefecture''', part of the '''Shijūzuka Kofun Cluster'''. * {{ill|Ōtōka Kofun Cluster|ja|大稲荷古墳群|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōtōka Kofun Cluster|1=Ōtōka Kofun Cluster|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q17222769}} - Located in '''Gyōda City, Saitama Prefecture'''. * {{ill|Sanpei Inari Shrine Kofun|ja|三変稲荷神社古墳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sanpei Inari Shrine Kofun|1=Sanpen Inari-jinja Kofun|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q17228685}} - Located in '''Kawagoe City, Saitama Prefecture''', part of the '''Semba Kofun Cluster'''. * {{ill|Tsurugaoka Inari Shrine Kofun|ja|鶴ヶ丘稲荷神社古墳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsurugaoka Inari Shrine Kofun|qq=}} - Located in '''Tsurugashima City, Saitama Prefecture'''. * {{ill|Inari-yama Park Kofun Cluster|ja|稲荷山公園古墳群|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Inari-yama Park Kofun Cluster|1=Inariyama Kōen Kofun Cluster|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11596863}} - Located in '''Sayama City, Saitama Prefecture'''. * [[:en:Inaridai Kofun Group|Inaridai Kofun Group]] - Located in '''Ichihara City, Chiba Prefecture'''. ** {{ill|Inaridai No.1 Kofun|ja|稲荷台1号墳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Inaridai No.1 Kofun|comment=enwiki is a redirect}}''' (稲荷台1号墳)'''

== Overview == Throughout '''Japan''', there are many kofun with names such as '''"Inari-zuka"''' (稲荷塚) and '''"Inari-yama"''' (稲荷山). Additionally, there are variations such as '''"Inari-mori"''' (稲荷森), '''"Inari-mae"''' (稲荷前), and '''"Inari-dai"''' (稲荷台), creating diverse '''naming patterns'''.

This article provides a list of '''kofun''' (ancient Kofuns) and '''kofun clusters''' in the '''Japanese Archipelago''' whose names include '''"Inari"''' (稲荷 / とうか / いなり).
== Overview == Throughout '''Japan''', there are many kofun with names such as '''"Inari-zuka"''' (稲荷塚) and '''"Inari-yama"''' (稲荷山). Additionally, there are variations such as '''"Inari-mori"''' (稲荷森), '''"Inari-mae"''' (稲荷前), and '''"Inari-dai"''' (稲荷台), creating diverse '''naming patterns'''.
== {{ill|Inariyama Kofun (disambiguation)|lt=Inariyama Kofun|ja|稲荷山古墳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Inariyama Kofun (disambiguation)|qq=}} == * [[:en:Shiroishi Inariyama Kofun|Shiraishi Inari-yama Kofun]] - Located in '''Fujioka City, Gunma Prefecture''', part of the '''Shiraishi Kofun Cluster'''. * {{ill|Inari-yama Kofun (Ōta City)|ja|稲荷山古墳 (太田市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Inari-yama Kofun (Ōta City)|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 群馬県立太田高等学校|1=Inari-yama Kofun (Ōta City)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11609647}} - Located in '''Ōta City, Gunma Prefecture'''. * {{ill|Kamikozuka Inari-yama Kofun|ja|上小塙稲荷山古墳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kamikozuka Inari-yama Kofun|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Located in '''Takasaki City, Gunma Prefecture'''. * {{ill|Kazekaeshi Inari-yama Kofun|ja|風返稲荷山古墳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kazekaeshi Inari-yama Kofun|1=Kazekaeshi Inari-yama Kofun|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q117090199}} - Located in '''Kasumigaura City, Ibaraki Prefecture'''. * [[:en:Inariyama Kofun|Inariyama Kofun]] - Located in '''Gyōda City, Saitama Prefecture''', part of the '''Saitama Kofun Cluster'''. ** [[:en:Inariyama Sword|Inariyama Kofun Iron Sword]]''' (稲荷山古墳出土鉄剣)'''
* {{ill|Inari-yama Kofun (Futtsu City)|ja|稲荷山古墳 (富津市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Inari-yama Kofun (Futtsu City)|1=Inari-yama Kofun (Futtsu City)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11596865}} - Located in '''Futtsu City, Chiba Prefecture''', part of the '''Dairizuka Kofun Cluster'''. * {{ill|Inari-yama Kofun (Makinohara City)|ja|稲荷山古墳 (牧之原市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Inari-yama Kofun (Makinohara City)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Located in '''Makinohara City, Shizuoka Prefecture'''. * [[:en:Mikuriyama Kofun group|Mikuriya Kofun Cluster]] - Located in '''Iwata City, Shizuoka Prefecture''', part of the '''Mikuriya Kofun Cluster'''. * {{ill|Mitsui Inari-yama Kofun|ja|三ツ井稲荷山古墳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mitsui Inari-yama Kofun|1=Mitsui Inariyama kofun|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11353998}} - Located in '''Ichinomiya City, Aichi Prefecture'''. * {{ill|Kamo Inari-yama Kofun|ja|鴨稲荷山古墳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kamo Inari-yama Kofun|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 稲荷山古墳 (高島市)|1=Inariyama Kofun|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q17193420}} - Located in '''Takashima City, Shiga Prefecture'''. * {{ill|Inari-yama Kofun (Tanba-Sasayama City)|ja|稲荷山古墳 (丹波篠山市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Inari-yama Kofun (Tanba-Sasayama City)|1=Inariyama Kofun (Tanbasasayama)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q78908788}} - Located in '''Tanba-Sasayama City, Hyōgo Prefecture'''.
== {{ill|Inari-zuka Kofun|ja|稲荷塚古墳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Inari-zuka Kofun|1=Inarizuka Kofun|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11596855}} == * {{ill|Inarizuka Kofun|ja|稲荷塚古墳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Inarizuka Kofun|qq=}} - A rare {{ill|Octagonal Kofun|ja|八角墳|1=Octagonal Kofun|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Octagonal Kofun|13=User:Immanuelle/Octagonal Kofun|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} * {{ill|Inari-zuka Kofun Cluster|ja|稲荷塚古墳群|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Inari-zuka Kofun Cluster|1=Inari-zuka Kofun Cluster|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q17193418}} - Located in '''Kawajima Town, Hiki District, Saitama Prefecture'''. * {{ill|Inari-zuka Kofun (Ranzan Town)|ja|稲荷塚古墳 (嵐山町)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Inari-zuka Kofun (Ranzan Town)|1=Inari-zuka Kofun (Ranzan Town)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q17193416}} - Located in '''Ranzan Town, Hiki District, Saitama Prefecture'''. * {{ill|Hikizugawa Kofun Cluster|ja|樋遣川古墳群|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hikizugawa Kofun Cluster|1=Hikizugawa Kofun Cluster|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11542198}} - Located in '''Kazo City, Saitama Prefecture''', part of the '''Hikizugawa Kofun Cluster'''. * {{ill|Inari-zuka Kofun (Tama City)|ja|稲荷塚古墳 (多摩市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Inari-zuka Kofun (Tama City)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Located in '''Tama City, Tokyo Prefecture'''. * {{ill|Inari-zuka Kofun (Kōfu City)|ja|稲荷塚古墳 (甲府市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Inari-zuka Kofun (Kōfu City)|1=Inari-zuka Kofun (Kōfu City)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11596856}} - Located in '''Kōfu City, Yamanashi Prefecture'''. * {{ill|Inari-zuka Kofun (Habikino City)|ja|稲荷塚古墳 (羽曳野市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Inari-zuka Kofun (Habikino City)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Located in '''Habikino City, Osaka Prefecture''', part of the '''Furuichi Kofun Cluster'''. * {{ill|Inouchi Inari-zuka Kofun|ja|井ノ内稲荷塚古墳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Inouchi Inari-zuka Kofun|1=Inouchi Inarizuka Kofun|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q116257052}} - Located in '''Nagaokakyo City, Kyoto Prefecture'''.
== Other Kofun == * [[:en:Inarimori Kofun|Inari-mori Kofun]] - Located in '''Nanyō City, Yamagata Prefecture'''. * {{ill|Inari Kofun Cluster|ja|稲荷古墳群|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Inari Kofun Cluster|1=Inari Kofun Cluster|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q109361208}} - Located in '''Utsunomiya City, Tochigi Prefecture'''. * {{ill|Tora Inari Kofun|ja|寅稲荷古墳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tora Inari Kofun|1=Tora Inari Kofun|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q17229373}} - Located in '''Fukaya City, Saitama Prefecture''', part of the '''Shijūzuka Kofun Cluster'''. * {{ill|Ōtōka Kofun Cluster|ja|大稲荷古墳群|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōtōka Kofun Cluster|1=Ōtōka Kofun Cluster|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q17222769}} - Located in '''Gyōda City, Saitama Prefecture'''. * {{ill|Sanpei Inari Shrine Kofun|ja|三変稲荷神社古墳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sanpei Inari Shrine Kofun|1=Sanpen Inari-jinja Kofun|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q17228685}} - Located in '''Kawagoe City, Saitama Prefecture''', part of the '''Semba Kofun Cluster'''. * {{ill|Tsurugaoka Inari Shrine Kofun|ja|鶴ヶ丘稲荷神社古墳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsurugaoka Inari Shrine Kofun|qq=}} - Located in '''Tsurugashima City, Saitama Prefecture'''. * {{ill|Inari-yama Park Kofun Cluster|ja|稲荷山公園古墳群|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Inari-yama Park Kofun Cluster|1=Inariyama Kōen Kofun Cluster|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11596863}} - Located in '''Sayama City, Saitama Prefecture'''. * [[:en:Inaridai Kofun Group|Inaridai Kofun Group]] - Located in '''Ichihara City, Chiba Prefecture'''. ** {{ill|Inaridai No.1 Kofun|ja|稲荷台1号墳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Inaridai No.1 Kofun|comment=enwiki is a redirect}}''' (稲荷台1号墳)'''
* {{ill|Gion-Nagasuga Kofun Cluster|ja|祇園・長須賀古墳群|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gion-Nagasuga Kofun Cluster|1=Gion‑Nagasuka Kofun Cluster|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11588419}} - Located in '''Kisarazu City, Chiba Prefecture''', part of the '''Gion-Nagasuga Kofun Cluster'''. * {{ill|Inari-mae Kofun Cluster|ja|稲荷前古墳群|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Inari-mae Kofun Cluster|1=Inarimae Kofun Group|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11596844}} - Located in '''Yokohama City, Kanagawa Prefecture'''. * {{ill|Motoinari Kofun|ja|元稲荷古墳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Motoinari Kofun|qq=}} - Located in '''Muko City, Kyoto Prefecture''', part of the '''Muko Hill Kofun Cluster'''.

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:「稲荷」の付く日本列島の古墳一覧]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:「稲荷」の付く日本列島の古墳一覧]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:「稲荷」の付く日本列島の古墳一覧]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q123992447]] Wikidata name: (none) [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 05:21, 12 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|Wikidata entry (none) Wikidata name: (none) [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 07:51, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} '''List of Kofun in the Japanese Archipelago with the Name "Inari"''' (「稲荷」の付く日本列島の古墳一覧)
This article provides a list of '''kofun''' (ancient Kofuns) and '''kofun clusters''' in the '''Japanese Archipelago''' whose names include '''"Inari"''' (稲荷 / とうか / いなり).
== Overview == Throughout '''Japan''', there are many kofun with names such as '''"Inari-zuka"''' (稲荷塚) and '''"Inari-yama"''' (稲荷山). Additionally, there are variations such as '''"Inari-mori"''' (稲荷森), '''"Inari-mae"''' (稲荷前), and '''"Inari-dai"''' (稲荷台), creating diverse '''naming patterns'''.
== {{ill|Inariyama Kofun (disambiguation)|lt=Inariyama Kofun|ja|稲荷山古墳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Inariyama Kofun (disambiguation)|qq=}} == * [[:en:Shiroishi Inariyama Kofun|Shiraishi Inari-yama Kofun]] - Located in '''Fujioka City, Gunma Prefecture''', part of the '''Shiraishi Kofun Cluster'''. * {{ill|Inari-yama Kofun (Ōta City)|ja|稲荷山古墳 (太田市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Inari-yama Kofun (Ōta City)|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 群馬県立太田高等学校|1=Inari-yama Kofun (Ōta City)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11609647}} - Located in '''Ōta City, Gunma Prefecture'''. * {{ill|Kamikozuka Inari-yama Kofun|ja|上小塙稲荷山古墳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kamikozuka Inari-yama Kofun|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Located in '''Takasaki City, Gunma Prefecture'''. * {{ill|Kazekaeshi Inari-yama Kofun|ja|風返稲荷山古墳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kazekaeshi Inari-yama Kofun|1=Kazekaeshi Inari-yama Kofun|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q117090199}} - Located in '''Kasumigaura City, Ibaraki Prefecture'''. * [[:en:Inariyama Kofun|Inariyama Kofun]] - Located in '''Gyōda City, Saitama Prefecture''', part of the '''Saitama Kofun Cluster'''. ** [[:en:Inariyama Sword|Inariyama Kofun Iron Sword]]''' (稲荷山古墳出土鉄剣)'''

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:「稲荷」の付く日本列島の古墳一覧]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:「稲荷」の付く日本列島の古墳一覧]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:「稲荷」の付く日本列島の古墳一覧]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q123992447]] Wikidata name: (none) [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 05:21, 12 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|Wikidata entry (none) Wikidata name: (none) [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 07:51, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} '''List of Kofun in the Japanese Archipelago with the Name "Inari"''' (「稲荷」の付く日本列島の古墳一覧)
This article provides a list of '''kofun''' (ancient Kofuns) and '''kofun clusters''' in the '''Japanese Archipelago''' whose names include '''"Inari"''' (稲荷 / とうか / いなり).
== Overview == Throughout '''Japan''', there are many kofun with names such as '''"Inari-zuka"''' (稲荷塚) and '''"Inari-yama"''' (稲荷山). Additionally, there are variations such as '''"Inari-mori"''' (稲荷森), '''"Inari-mae"''' (稲荷前), and '''"Inari-dai"''' (稲荷台), creating diverse '''naming patterns'''.
== {{ill|Inariyama Kofun (disambiguation)|lt=Inariyama Kofun|ja|稲荷山古墳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Inariyama Kofun (disambiguation)|qq=}} == * [[:en:Shiroishi Inariyama Kofun|Shiraishi Inari-yama Kofun]] - Located in '''Fujioka City, Gunma Prefecture''', part of the '''Shiraishi Kofun Cluster'''. * {{ill|Inari-yama Kofun (Ōta City)|ja|稲荷山古墳 (太田市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Inari-yama Kofun (Ōta City)|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 群馬県立太田高等学校|1=Inari-yama Kofun (Ōta City)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11609647}} - Located in '''Ōta City, Gunma Prefecture'''. * {{ill|Kamikozuka Inari-yama Kofun|ja|上小塙稲荷山古墳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kamikozuka Inari-yama Kofun|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Located in '''Takasaki City, Gunma Prefecture'''. * {{ill|Kazekaeshi Inari-yama Kofun|ja|風返稲荷山古墳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kazekaeshi Inari-yama Kofun|1=Kazekaeshi Inari-yama Kofun|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q117090199}} - Located in '''Kasumigaura City, Ibaraki Prefecture'''. * [[:en:Inariyama Kofun|Inariyama Kofun]] - Located in '''Gyōda City, Saitama Prefecture''', part of the '''Saitama Kofun Cluster'''. ** [[:en:Inariyama Sword|Inariyama Kofun Iron Sword]]''' (稲荷山古墳出土鉄剣)'''
* {{ill|Inari-yama Kofun (Futtsu City)|ja|稲荷山古墳 (富津市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Inari-yama Kofun (Futtsu City)|1=Inari-yama Kofun (Futtsu City)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11596865}} - Located in '''Futtsu City, Chiba Prefecture''', part of the '''Dairizuka Kofun Cluster'''. * {{ill|Inari-yama Kofun (Makinohara City)|ja|稲荷山古墳 (牧之原市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Inari-yama Kofun (Makinohara City)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Located in '''Makinohara City, Shizuoka Prefecture'''. * [[:en:Mikuriyama Kofun group|Mikuriya Kofun Cluster]] - Located in '''Iwata City, Shizuoka Prefecture''', part of the '''Mikuriya Kofun Cluster'''. * {{ill|Mitsui Inari-yama Kofun|ja|三ツ井稲荷山古墳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mitsui Inari-yama Kofun|1=Mitsui Inariyama kofun|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11353998}} - Located in '''Ichinomiya City, Aichi Prefecture'''. * {{ill|Kamo Inari-yama Kofun|ja|鴨稲荷山古墳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kamo Inari-yama Kofun|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 稲荷山古墳 (高島市)|1=Inariyama Kofun|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q17193420}} - Located in '''Takashima City, Shiga Prefecture'''. * {{ill|Inari-yama Kofun (Tanba-Sasayama City)|ja|稲荷山古墳 (丹波篠山市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Inari-yama Kofun (Tanba-Sasayama City)|1=Inariyama Kofun (Tanbasasayama)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q78908788}} - Located in '''Tanba-Sasayama City, Hyōgo Prefecture'''.
== {{ill|Inari-zuka Kofun|ja|稲荷塚古墳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Inari-zuka Kofun|1=Inarizuka Kofun|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11596855}} == * {{ill|Inarizuka Kofun|ja|稲荷塚古墳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Inarizuka Kofun|qq=}} - A rare {{ill|Octagonal Kofun|ja|八角墳|1=Octagonal Kofun|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Octagonal Kofun|13=User:Immanuelle/Octagonal Kofun|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} * {{ill|Inari-zuka Kofun Cluster|ja|稲荷塚古墳群|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Inari-zuka Kofun Cluster|1=Inari-zuka Kofun Cluster|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q17193418}} - Located in '''Kawajima Town, Hiki District, Saitama Prefecture'''. * {{ill|Inari-zuka Kofun (Ranzan Town)|ja|稲荷塚古墳 (嵐山町)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Inari-zuka Kofun (Ranzan Town)|1=Inari-zuka Kofun (Ranzan Town)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q17193416}} - Located in '''Ranzan Town, Hiki District, Saitama Prefecture'''. * {{ill|Hikizugawa Kofun Cluster|ja|樋遣川古墳群|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hikizugawa Kofun Cluster|1=Hikizugawa Kofun Cluster|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11542198}} - Located in '''Kazo City, Saitama Prefecture''', part of the '''Hikizugawa Kofun Cluster'''. * {{ill|Inari-zuka Kofun (Tama City)|ja|稲荷塚古墳 (多摩市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Inari-zuka Kofun (Tama City)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Located in '''Tama City, Tokyo Prefecture'''. * {{ill|Inari-zuka Kofun (Kōfu City)|ja|稲荷塚古墳 (甲府市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Inari-zuka Kofun (Kōfu City)|1=Inari-zuka Kofun (Kōfu City)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11596856}} - Located in '''Kōfu City, Yamanashi Prefecture'''. * {{ill|Inari-zuka Kofun (Habikino City)|ja|稲荷塚古墳 (羽曳野市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Inari-zuka Kofun (Habikino City)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Located in '''Habikino City, Osaka Prefecture''', part of the '''Furuichi Kofun Cluster'''. * {{ill|Inouchi Inari-zuka Kofun|ja|井ノ内稲荷塚古墳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Inouchi Inari-zuka Kofun|1=Inouchi Inarizuka Kofun|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q116257052}} - Located in '''Nagaokakyo City, Kyoto Prefecture'''.
== Other Kofun == * [[:en:Inarimori Kofun|Inari-mori Kofun]] - Located in '''Nanyō City, Yamagata Prefecture'''. * {{ill|Inari Kofun Cluster|ja|稲荷古墳群|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Inari Kofun Cluster|1=Inari Kofun Cluster|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q109361208}} - Located in '''Utsunomiya City, Tochigi Prefecture'''. * {{ill|Tora Inari Kofun|ja|寅稲荷古墳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tora Inari Kofun|1=Tora Inari Kofun|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q17229373}} - Located in '''Fukaya City, Saitama Prefecture''', part of the '''Shijūzuka Kofun Cluster'''. * {{ill|Ōtōka Kofun Cluster|ja|大稲荷古墳群|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōtōka Kofun Cluster|1=Ōtōka Kofun Cluster|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q17222769}} - Located in '''Gyōda City, Saitama Prefecture'''. * {{ill|Sanpei Inari Shrine Kofun|ja|三変稲荷神社古墳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sanpei Inari Shrine Kofun|1=Sanpen Inari-jinja Kofun|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q17228685}} - Located in '''Kawagoe City, Saitama Prefecture''', part of the '''Semba Kofun Cluster'''. * {{ill|Tsurugaoka Inari Shrine Kofun|ja|鶴ヶ丘稲荷神社古墳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsurugaoka Inari Shrine Kofun|qq=}} - Located in '''Tsurugashima City, Saitama Prefecture'''. * {{ill|Inari-yama Park Kofun Cluster|ja|稲荷山公園古墳群|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Inari-yama Park Kofun Cluster|1=Inariyama Kōen Kofun Cluster|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11596863}} - Located in '''Sayama City, Saitama Prefecture'''. * [[:en:Inaridai Kofun Group|Inaridai Kofun Group]] - Located in '''Ichihara City, Chiba Prefecture'''. ** {{ill|Inaridai No.1 Kofun|ja|稲荷台1号墳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Inaridai No.1 Kofun|comment=enwiki is a redirect}}''' (稲荷台1号墳)'''
* {{ill|Gion-Nagasuga Kofun Cluster|ja|祇園・長須賀古墳群|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gion-Nagasuga Kofun Cluster|1=Gion‑Nagasuka Kofun Cluster|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11588419}} - Located in '''Kisarazu City, Chiba Prefecture''', part of the '''Gion-Nagasuga Kofun Cluster'''. * {{ill|Inari-mae Kofun Cluster|ja|稲荷前古墳群|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Inari-mae Kofun Cluster|1=Inarimae Kofun Group|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11596844}} - Located in '''Yokohama City, Kanagawa Prefecture'''. * {{ill|Motoinari Kofun|ja|元稲荷古墳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Motoinari Kofun|qq=}} - Located in '''Muko City, Kyoto Prefecture''', part of the '''Muko Hill Kofun Cluster'''.

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:「稲荷」の付く日本列島の古墳一覧]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:「稲荷」の付く日本列島の古墳一覧]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:「稲荷」の付く日本列島の古墳一覧]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q123992447]] Wikidata name: (none) [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 05:21, 12 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|Wikidata entry (none) Wikidata name: (none) [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 07:51, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} '''List of Kofun in the Japanese Archipelago with the Name "Inari"''' (「稲荷」の付く日本列島の古墳一覧)
This article provides a list of '''kofun''' (ancient Kofuns) and '''kofun clusters''' in the '''Japanese Archipelago''' whose names include '''"Inari"''' (稲荷 / とうか / いなり).
== Overview == Throughout '''Japan''', there are many kofun with names such as '''"Inari-zuka"''' (稲荷塚) and '''"Inari-yama"''' (稲荷山). Additionally, there are variations such as '''"Inari-mori"''' (稲荷森), '''"Inari-mae"''' (稲荷前), and '''"Inari-dai"''' (稲荷台), creating diverse '''naming patterns'''.
== {{ill|Inariyama Kofun (disambiguation)|lt=Inariyama Kofun|ja|稲荷山古墳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Inariyama Kofun (disambiguation)|qq=}} == * {{ill|Shiroishi Inariyama Kofun|en|Shiroishi Inariyama Kofun|WD=Q17216721|lt=Shiraishi Inari-yama Kofun}} - Located in '''Fujioka City, Gunma Prefecture''', part of the '''Shiraishi Kofun Cluster'''. * {{ill|Inari-yama Kofun (Ōta City)|ja|稲荷山古墳 (太田市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Inari-yama Kofun (Ōta City)|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 群馬県立太田高等学校|1=Inari-yama Kofun (Ōta City)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11609647}} - Located in '''Ōta City, Gunma Prefecture'''. * {{ill|Kamikozuka Inari-yama Kofun|ja|上小塙稲荷山古墳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kamikozuka Inari-yama Kofun|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Located in '''Takasaki City, Gunma Prefecture'''. * {{ill|Kazekaeshi Inari-yama Kofun|ja|風返稲荷山古墳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kazekaeshi Inari-yama Kofun|1=Kazekaeshi Inari-yama Kofun|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q117090199}} - Located in '''Kasumigaura City, Ibaraki Prefecture'''. * {{ill|Inariyama Kofun|en|Inariyama Kofun|WD=Q3198272|lt=Inariyama Kofun}} - Located in '''Gyōda City, Saitama Prefecture''', part of the '''Saitama Kofun Cluster'''. ** {{ill|Inariyama Sword|en|Inariyama Sword|WD=Q856395|lt=Inariyama Kofun Iron Sword}}''' (稲荷山古墳出土鉄剣)'''
* {{ill|Inari-yama Kofun (Futtsu City)|ja|稲荷山古墳 (富津市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Inari-yama Kofun (Futtsu City)|1=Inari-yama Kofun (Futtsu City)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11596865}} - Located in '''Futtsu City, Chiba Prefecture''', part of the '''Dairizuka Kofun Cluster'''. * {{ill|Inari-yama Kofun (Makinohara City)|ja|稲荷山古墳 (牧之原市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Inari-yama Kofun (Makinohara City)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Located in '''Makinohara City, Shizuoka Prefecture'''. * {{ill|Mikuriyama Kofun group|en|Mikuriyama Kofun group|WD=Q87769616|lt=Mikuriya Kofun Cluster}} - Located in '''Iwata City, Shizuoka Prefecture''', part of the '''Mikuriya Kofun Cluster'''. * {{ill|Mitsui Inari-yama Kofun|ja|三ツ井稲荷山古墳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mitsui Inari-yama Kofun|1=Mitsui Inariyama kofun|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11353998}} - Located in '''Ichinomiya City, Aichi Prefecture'''. * {{ill|Kamo Inari-yama Kofun|ja|鴨稲荷山古墳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kamo Inari-yama Kofun|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 稲荷山古墳 (高島市)|1=Inariyama Kofun|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q17193420}} - Located in '''Takashima City, Shiga Prefecture'''. * {{ill|Inari-yama Kofun (Tanba-Sasayama City)|ja|稲荷山古墳 (丹波篠山市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Inari-yama Kofun (Tanba-Sasayama City)|1=Inariyama Kofun (Tanbasasayama)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q78908788}} - Located in '''Tanba-Sasayama City, Hyōgo Prefecture'''.
== {{ill|Inari-zuka Kofun|ja|稲荷塚古墳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Inari-zuka Kofun|1=Inarizuka Kofun|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11596855}} == * {{ill|Inarizuka Kofun|ja|稲荷塚古墳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Inarizuka Kofun|qq=}} - A rare {{ill|Octagonal Kofun|ja|八角墳|1=Octagonal Kofun|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Octagonal Kofun|13=User:Immanuelle/Octagonal Kofun|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} * {{ill|Inari-zuka Kofun Cluster|ja|稲荷塚古墳群|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Inari-zuka Kofun Cluster|1=Inari-zuka Kofun Cluster|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q17193418}} - Located in '''Kawajima Town, Hiki District, Saitama Prefecture'''. * {{ill|Inari-zuka Kofun (Ranzan Town)|ja|稲荷塚古墳 (嵐山町)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Inari-zuka Kofun (Ranzan Town)|1=Inari-zuka Kofun (Ranzan Town)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q17193416}} - Located in '''Ranzan Town, Hiki District, Saitama Prefecture'''. * {{ill|Hikizugawa Kofun Cluster|ja|樋遣川古墳群|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hikizugawa Kofun Cluster|1=Hikizugawa Kofun Cluster|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11542198}} - Located in '''Kazo City, Saitama Prefecture''', part of the '''Hikizugawa Kofun Cluster'''. * {{ill|Inari-zuka Kofun (Tama City)|ja|稲荷塚古墳 (多摩市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Inari-zuka Kofun (Tama City)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Located in '''Tama City, Tokyo Prefecture'''. * {{ill|Inari-zuka Kofun (Kōfu City)|ja|稲荷塚古墳 (甲府市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Inari-zuka Kofun (Kōfu City)|1=Inari-zuka Kofun (Kōfu City)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11596856}} - Located in '''Kōfu City, Yamanashi Prefecture'''. * {{ill|Inari-zuka Kofun (Habikino City)|ja|稲荷塚古墳 (羽曳野市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Inari-zuka Kofun (Habikino City)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Located in '''Habikino City, Osaka Prefecture''', part of the '''Furuichi Kofun Cluster'''. * {{ill|Inouchi Inari-zuka Kofun|ja|井ノ内稲荷塚古墳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Inouchi Inari-zuka Kofun|1=Inouchi Inarizuka Kofun|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q116257052}} - Located in '''Nagaokakyo City, Kyoto Prefecture'''.
== Other Kofun == * {{ill|Inarimori Kofun|en|Inarimori Kofun|WD=Q11596873|lt=Inari-mori Kofun}} - Located in '''Nanyō City, Yamagata Prefecture'''. * {{ill|Inari Kofun Cluster|ja|稲荷古墳群|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Inari Kofun Cluster|1=Inari Kofun Cluster|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q109361208}} - Located in '''Utsunomiya City, Tochigi Prefecture'''. * {{ill|Tora Inari Kofun|ja|寅稲荷古墳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tora Inari Kofun|1=Tora Inari Kofun|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q17229373}} - Located in '''Fukaya City, Saitama Prefecture''', part of the '''Shijūzuka Kofun Cluster'''. * {{ill|Ōtōka Kofun Cluster|ja|大稲荷古墳群|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōtōka Kofun Cluster|1=Ōtōka Kofun Cluster|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q17222769}} - Located in '''Gyōda City, Saitama Prefecture'''. * {{ill|Sanpei Inari Shrine Kofun|ja|三変稲荷神社古墳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sanpei Inari Shrine Kofun|1=Sanpen Inari-jinja Kofun|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q17228685}} - Located in '''Kawagoe City, Saitama Prefecture''', part of the '''Semba Kofun Cluster'''. * {{ill|Tsurugaoka Inari Shrine Kofun|ja|鶴ヶ丘稲荷神社古墳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsurugaoka Inari Shrine Kofun|qq=}} - Located in '''Tsurugashima City, Saitama Prefecture'''. * {{ill|Inari-yama Park Kofun Cluster|ja|稲荷山公園古墳群|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Inari-yama Park Kofun Cluster|1=Inariyama Kōen Kofun Cluster|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11596863}} - Located in '''Sayama City, Saitama Prefecture'''. * {{ill|Inaridai Kofun Group|en|Inaridai Kofun Group|WD=Q11596849|lt=Inaridai Kofun Group}} - Located in '''Ichihara City, Chiba Prefecture'''. ** {{ill|Inaridai No.1 Kofun|ja|稲荷台1号墳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Inaridai No.1 Kofun|comment=enwiki is a redirect}}''' (稲荷台1号墳)'''

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:「稲荷」の付く日本列島の古墳一覧]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:「稲荷」の付く日本列島の古墳一覧]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:「稲荷」の付く日本列島の古墳一覧]]
'''List of Kofun in the Japanese Archipelago with the Name "Inari"''' (「稲荷」の付く日本列島の古墳一覧)
This article provides a list of '''kofun''' (ancient Kofuns) and '''kofun clusters''' in the '''Japanese Archipelago''' whose names include '''"Inari"''' (稲荷 / とうか / いなり).
== Overview == Throughout '''Japan''', there are many kofun with names such as '''"Inari-zuka"''' (稲荷塚) and '''"Inari-yama"''' (稲荷山). Additionally, there are variations such as '''"Inari-mori"''' (稲荷森), '''"Inari-mae"''' (稲荷前), and '''"Inari-dai"''' (稲荷台), creating diverse '''naming patterns'''.
== {{ill|Inariyama Kofun (disambiguation)|lt=Inariyama Kofun|ja|稲荷山古墳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Inariyama Kofun (disambiguation)|qq=}} == * {{ill|Shiroishi Inariyama Kofun|en|Shiroishi Inariyama Kofun|WD=Q17216721|lt=Shiraishi Inari-yama Kofun}} - Located in '''Fujioka City, Gunma Prefecture''', part of the '''Shiraishi Kofun Cluster'''. * {{ill|Inari-yama Kofun (Ōta City)|ja|稲荷山古墳 (太田市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Inari-yama Kofun (Ōta City)|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 群馬県立太田高等学校|1=Inari-yama Kofun (Ōta City)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11609647}} - Located in '''Ōta City, Gunma Prefecture'''. * {{ill|Kamikozuka Inari-yama Kofun|ja|上小塙稲荷山古墳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kamikozuka Inari-yama Kofun|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Located in '''Takasaki City, Gunma Prefecture'''. * {{ill|Kazekaeshi Inari-yama Kofun|ja|風返稲荷山古墳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kazekaeshi Inari-yama Kofun|1=Kazekaeshi Inari-yama Kofun|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q117090199}} - Located in '''Kasumigaura City, Ibaraki Prefecture'''. * {{ill|Inariyama Kofun|en|Inariyama Kofun|WD=Q3198272|lt=Inariyama Kofun}} - Located in '''Gyōda City, Saitama Prefecture''', part of the '''Saitama Kofun Cluster'''. ** {{ill|Inariyama Sword|en|Inariyama Sword|WD=Q856395|lt=Inariyama Kofun Iron Sword}}''' (稲荷山古墳出土鉄剣)'''
* {{ill|Inari-yama Kofun (Futtsu City)|ja|稲荷山古墳 (富津市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Inari-yama Kofun (Futtsu City)|1=Inari-yama Kofun (Futtsu City)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11596865}} - Located in '''Futtsu City, Chiba Prefecture''', part of the '''Dairizuka Kofun Cluster'''. * {{ill|Inari-yama Kofun (Makinohara City)|ja|稲荷山古墳 (牧之原市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Inari-yama Kofun (Makinohara City)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Located in '''Makinohara City, Shizuoka Prefecture'''. * {{ill|Mikuriyama Kofun group|en|Mikuriyama Kofun group|WD=Q87769616|lt=Mikuriya Kofun Cluster}} - Located in '''Iwata City, Shizuoka Prefecture''', part of the '''Mikuriya Kofun Cluster'''. * {{ill|Mitsui Inari-yama Kofun|ja|三ツ井稲荷山古墳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mitsui Inari-yama Kofun|1=Mitsui Inariyama kofun|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11353998}} - Located in '''Ichinomiya City, Aichi Prefecture'''. * {{ill|Kamo Inari-yama Kofun|ja|鴨稲荷山古墳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kamo Inari-yama Kofun|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 稲荷山古墳 (高島市)|1=Inariyama Kofun|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q17193420}} - Located in '''Takashima City, Shiga Prefecture'''. * {{ill|Inari-yama Kofun (Tanba-Sasayama City)|ja|稲荷山古墳 (丹波篠山市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Inari-yama Kofun (Tanba-Sasayama City)|1=Inariyama Kofun (Tanbasasayama)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q78908788}} - Located in '''Tanba-Sasayama City, Hyōgo Prefecture'''.

'''List of Kofun in the Japanese Archipelago with the Name "Inari"''' (「稲荷」の付く日本列島の古墳一覧)
This article provides a list of '''kofun''' (ancient Kofuns) and '''kofun clusters''' in the '''Japanese Archipelago''' whose names include '''"Inari"''' (稲荷 / とうか / いなり).
== Overview == Throughout '''Japan''', there are many kofun with names such as '''"Inari-zuka"''' (稲荷塚) and '''"Inari-yama"''' (稲荷山). Additionally, there are variations such as '''"Inari-mori"''' (稲荷森), '''"Inari-mae"''' (稲荷前), and '''"Inari-dai"''' (稲荷台), creating diverse '''naming patterns'''.

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:「稲荷」の付く日本列島の古墳一覧]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:「稲荷」の付く日本列島の古墳一覧]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:「稲荷」の付く日本列島の古墳一覧]]
'''List of Kofun in the Japanese Archipelago with the Name "Inari"''' (「稲荷」の付く日本列島の古墳一覧)
This article provides a list of '''kofun''' (ancient Kofuns) and '''kofun clusters''' in the '''Japanese Archipelago''' whose names include '''"Inari"''' (稲荷 / とうか / いなり).
== Overview == Throughout '''Japan''', there are many kofun with names such as '''"Inari-zuka"''' (稲荷塚) and '''"Inari-yama"''' (稲荷山). Additionally, there are variations such as '''"Inari-mori"''' (稲荷森), '''"Inari-mae"''' (稲荷前), and '''"Inari-dai"''' (稲荷台), creating diverse '''naming patterns'''.

'''List of Kofun in the Japanese Archipelago with the Name "Inari"''' (「稲荷」の付く日本列島の古墳一覧)
This article provides a list of '''kofun''' (ancient Kofuns) and '''kofun clusters''' in the '''Japanese Archipelago''' whose names include '''"Inari"''' (稲荷 / とうか / いなり).
== Overview == Throughout '''Japan''', there are many kofun with names such as '''"Inari-zuka"''' (稲荷塚) and '''"Inari-yama"''' (稲荷山). Additionally, there are variations such as '''"Inari-mori"''' (稲荷森), '''"Inari-mae"''' (稲荷前), and '''"Inari-dai"''' (稲荷台), creating diverse '''naming patterns'''.
== {{ill|Inariyama Kofun (disambiguation)|lt=Inariyama Kofun|ja|稲荷山古墳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Inariyama Kofun (disambiguation)|qq=}} == * {{ill|Shiroishi Inariyama Kofun|en|Shiroishi Inariyama Kofun|WD=Q17216721|lt=Shiraishi Inari-yama Kofun|1=Shiroishi Inariyama Kofun}} - Located in '''Fujioka City, Gunma Prefecture''', part of the '''Shiraishi Kofun Cluster'''. * {{ill|Inari-yama Kofun (Ōta City)|ja|稲荷山古墳 (太田市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Inari-yama Kofun (Ōta City)|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 群馬県立太田高等学校|1=Q11609647|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11609647}} - Located in '''Ōta City, Gunma Prefecture'''. * {{ill|Kamikozuka Inari-yama Kofun|ja|上小塙稲荷山古墳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kamikozuka Inari-yama Kofun|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Located in '''Takasaki City, Gunma Prefecture'''. * {{ill|Kazekaeshi Inari-yama Kofun|ja|風返稲荷山古墳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kazekaeshi Inari-yama Kofun|1=Q117090199|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q117090199}} - Located in '''Kasumigaura City, Ibaraki Prefecture'''. * {{ill|Inariyama Kofun|en|Inariyama Kofun|WD=Q3198272|lt=Inariyama Kofun|1=Inariyama Kofun}} - Located in '''Gyōda City, Saitama Prefecture''', part of the '''Saitama Kofun Cluster'''. ** {{ill|Inariyama Sword|en|Inariyama Sword|WD=Q856395|lt=Inariyama Kofun Iron Sword|1=Inariyama Sword}}''' (稲荷山古墳出土鉄剣)'''

revision.text:
'''List of Kofun in the Japanese Archipelago with the Name "Inari"''' (「稲荷」の付く日本列島の古墳一覧)
This article provides a list of '''kofun''' (ancient Kofuns) and '''kofun clusters''' in the '''Japanese Archipelago''' whose names include '''"Inari"''' (稲荷 / とうか / いなり).
== Overview == Throughout '''Japan''', there are many kofun with names such as '''"Inari-zuka"''' (稲荷塚) and '''"Inari-yama"''' (稲荷山). Additionally, there are variations such as '''"Inari-mori"''' (稲荷森), '''"Inari-mae"''' (稲荷前), and '''"Inari-dai"''' (稲荷台), creating diverse '''naming patterns'''.
== {{ill|Inariyama Kofun (disambiguation)|lt=Inariyama Kofun|ja|稲荷山古墳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Inariyama Kofun (disambiguation)|qq=}} == * {{ill|Shiroishi Inariyama Kofun|en|Shiroishi Inariyama Kofun|qid=Q17216721|lt=Shiraishi Inari-yama Kofun|1=Shiroishi Inariyama Kofun}} - Located in '''Fujioka City, Gunma Prefecture''', part of the '''Shiraishi Kofun Cluster'''. * {{ill|Inari-yama Kofun (Ōta City)|ja|稲荷山古墳 (太田市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Inari-yama Kofun (Ōta City)|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 群馬県立太田高等学校|1=Q11609647|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11609647}} - Located in '''Ōta City, Gunma Prefecture'''. * {{ill|Kamikozuka Inari-yama Kofun|ja|上小塙稲荷山古墳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kamikozuka Inari-yama Kofun|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Located in '''Takasaki City, Gunma Prefecture'''. * {{ill|Kazekaeshi Inari-yama Kofun|ja|風返稲荷山古墳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kazekaeshi Inari-yama Kofun|1=Q117090199|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q117090199}} - Located in '''Kasumigaura City, Ibaraki Prefecture'''. * {{ill|Inariyama Kofun|en|Inariyama Kofun|qid=Q3198272|lt=Inariyama Kofun|1=Inariyama Kofun}} - Located in '''Gyōda City, Saitama Prefecture''', part of the '''Saitama Kofun Cluster'''. ** {{ill|Inariyama Sword|en|Inariyama Sword|qid=Q856395|lt=Inariyama Kofun Iron Sword|1=Inariyama Sword}}''' (稲荷山古墳出土鉄剣)'''
